b_day.1:
LEADERSHIP DAY. Maximize: leadership, creativity, progressive character, vigor, optimism, strong convictions, competitiveness, independence, sociability. 
Minimize: arrogance, selfishness, jealousy, antagonism, egotism, excessive pride, hesitation, impatience. You are a born leader; you like to command rather than do. You are creative and original, have logical and quick reasoning, and are capable of discussing a wide variety of subjects, even those you only know superficially. Sometimes, you may be considered 'cold' and uncommunicative, but you are not. You have difficulty showing affection, yet you like to be praised and admired. However, you are a kind person with strong emotions, humanitarian inclinations, and great leadership skills. You tend to be authoritarian, somewhat possessive, and somewhat egocentric. Due to his leadership characteristics, he does not appreciate subordinate positions and sometimes becomes irascible, violent, and inconsistent, making it very difficult to work and live with him. Although the adventurous side of his nature wants to express itself, his highly pragmatic vision and concern for security suggest a certain materialism. This indicates that even though idealism and vision play an important role in your life, concern about money, or lack thereof, keeps your feet firmly on the ground. When your projects or desires are not realized or are frustrated, you suffer greatly; then your nerves and blood pressure are overwhelmed. You have sophisticated logical reasoning and an active mind. It is important that you cultivate a broad vision and an open mind, otherwise you will become increasingly self-centered and focused on your goal, gradually losing energy and facing the possibility of making wrong choices. You need to be independent in your actions because, even though you are competent at work, you do not like to take orders or advice from superiors, and you do better working on your own. You also need to learn that the world does not revolve around you, avoiding the tendency to be self-centered or dictatorial. Those born on the first day need to want what they aim for. Studying, planning, and maintaining consistency in your goals should be your main tasks, as you have a tendency to leave everything half done or give glory to others. To avoid disappointment, they need to take their emotional life lightly and remember that they want to be happy. To succeed in life, they need reflection, thoughtfulness, tenacity, and persistence; they need power and knowledge.
b_day.2:
DIPLOMACY DAY. Maximize: kindness, tact, good partnerships, receptivity, intuition, consideration, harmony, in principle pleasing to everyone. 
Minimize: distrust, lack of objectivity, subservience, excessive sensitivity, emotionality, selfishness, and a tendency to be dishonest when unable to achieve goals through honest means. You are a diplomat par excellence. You are the one who harmonizes the group and the family; you have the gift of reconciliation. You are always attentive to the details of your environment. Deeply loving by nature, they are sentimental and affectionate and also need to receive affection. They understand the feelings of others and are incapable of hurting anyone intentionally. Due to their very sociable nature, they make great friends and good company. Even though they are loving and affectionate, they must be careful in choosing their relationships so that they are long-lasting. To be happy, you must seek financial security. With all your charm, you are very attractive to the opposite sex, but you do not like to be restricted in your movements. At work, you feel better developing activities related to two groups. Because you are extremely reliable, you are generally loved by everyone and are always an excellent professional. You cannot stand being idle and are always looking for something to do. With excellent social skills, you can thrive as a writer, in educational activities, advertising, public relations, law, diplomacy, and a wide variety of artistic activities. One of your major flaws is your tendency to underestimate your talents and abilities, both as a person and as a professional, often finding yourself subordinate to people with abilities inferior to yours. It is important to remain steadfast in order to overcome your periodic tendencies toward depression. You tend to underestimate your own abilities and run the risk of becoming a doormat for others or hiding your feelings of inferiority with an arrogant or overbearing attitude. But when you are confident in your abilities, you are kind, docile, understanding, and delicate. Believe in yourself and your potential, and from there, the world will open up to you! Avoid being carried away by the desire for power and control, and don't demand perfection. If you feel insecure, it may be difficult to carry out your personal plans, but if you find some form of artistic or creative expression, you can turn your dreams into reality.
b_day.3:
POPULARITY DAY. Maximize: good-humored, happy, friendly, productive, creative, artistic, loves freedom, talented with words, and has the power to desire. 
Minimize: easily bored, vain, overactive imagination, proud, extravagant, complacent, lazy, hypocritical, wasteful. People born on this day are unusually lively, creative, expressive, and popular. They may seem irresponsible to some who do not know them well, but in reality they are highly responsible and helpful to everyone and everything. They are fair, honest, and helpful, but ambitious. Those born on the 3rd strive to achieve high positions. They are dedicated to their family and responsible, always seeking to fulfill their obligations. The three is intuitive, original, honest, devoted to family and friends (sometimes even too much). They usually become the center of attention because they have the gift of entertaining and brightening up any environment without causing upset or provoking criticism. On the negative side, they seek attention by playing the victim or becoming aggressive. Their ambition and attractive personality can take them to the top of any career. Whether in banking or the arts, their aversion to taking orders from others can lead them to senior positions, such as manager or executive. They should focus on activities of real value. They will be successful when they devote themselves to liberal professions, taking advantage of their creative talents and initiative. You may do particularly well in theater, as an actor, director, or playwright. But you can also use your people skills in business, where you can start new projects in which you occupy a leadership position. Since you know how to delegate tasks to your subordinates, you can be an excellent administrator or work on your own. Because of your outgoing and friendly nature, you don't like to be criticized. You are the type who works on countless activities at the same time and almost always leaves them half done, that is, you have many beginnings and few endings. Number 3 is a fighter, creative and liberal, who should use their public speaking skills as a mainstay of their life.
b_day.4:
DAY OF PERSISTENCE. Maximize: organization, self-discipline, firmness, hardworking, skill, talent with your hands, pragmatic, reliable, precise. 
Minimize: lack of communication, rigidity, lack of feelings, procrastination, authoritarianism, hidden affections, resentment, severity. Those born on this day are very disciplined, constant, regular, and orderly. Persevering in their purposes, tireless workers, they rarely fail to achieve their goals. The four may enjoy routine, adapting to methodical work that requires concentrated effort. Their great organizational skills indicate that the 4 needs stability and order. Gifted with energy, practical skills, and great determination, they can be successful if they are willing to work hard. They are capable of adapting to regular and continuous work; capable of great effort, they require regularity in their projects; they are happiest when their work requires regularity, effort, and method. Concerned with security, they want to have a solid foundation for themselves and their families. Studies are of great importance to them, however, they should seek practicality so that what they learn has real usefulness in their lives. You are destined to reach the peak of your aspirations due to your persistence and calmness. Your pragmatic approach to life gives you good business sense and the ability to achieve material success. You are very economical, a friend to your friends, a loyal and dedicated companion, highly responsible, and respectful of the opposite sex. You also like to build things and work with your hands. When you are contradicted or people do things you don't like, you can become rude, offensive, and domineering, as you are easily offended. However, as you are a superior soul, you do not know how to hold on to anger, resentment, or any feelings of rebellion. When you are unable to achieve your goals or they are delayed by circumstances beyond your control, you become tremendously frustrated, which causes you headaches, melancholy, heart problems, and kidney problems.
b_day.5: VERSATILITY DAY. Maximize: versatile, adaptable, progressive, strong instincts, magnetic, lucky, daring, freedom-loving, insightful and quick, curious, sociable. Minimize: unreliable, unstable, procrastinator, inconsistent, overly confident, stubborn. Those born on this day are usually fun, cheerful, daring, gifted with psychic powers, fertile imagination, versatility, and also freedom-loving. The native of the 5th is gifted with remarkable psychic powers and should accept and follow their own premonitions; their intuitions. With a fertile imagination, they become versatile intellectuals, always interested in everything and wanting to know everything. They have a tendency to change partners several times throughout their long life. They also have a great ability to charm people with their optimism and generosity, but they must be careful not to become too authoritarian with those they love. They are constantly in search of money and do not like to take orders. They like to study and learn, so they can achieve their goals more easily. It is not in their nature to stand still, and they are always looking for ways, even exotic ones, to make money or fulfill themselves. They are not afraid of risks. You enjoy social life and make new friends easily, but when you feel like it, you abandon them and look for others in other environments. You love to travel for fun, study, or ego satisfaction. You are stubborn in your purposes (impatient and impulsive) and do not rest until you achieve your goals, even if you have to use unconventional tricks or harm someone. They like to be in contact with the public, preferably being the center of attention. At work, they feel better in occupations that put them in contact with people, but that allow them to act and express themselves freely. When frustrated professionally, he may experience insomnia and headaches. When he wants to or is encouraged, he achieves fantastic results in the professional field, as he has great discernment, extensive knowledge, and satisfaction in what he does. However, his dark side, his "libertine" side, leads him to have many beginnings and few endings.
b_day.6:
DAY OF LOVE. Maximize: universal, fraternal, compassionate, trustworthy, understanding, supportive, idealistic, domestically inclined, humanitarian, balanced, artistic. 
Minimize: dissatisfied, anxious, shy, irrational, stubborn, disharmonious, domineering, selfish, distrustful, cynical, egocentric. Those born on the sixth are usually sentimental, very balanced, understanding, love their family, home, friends, children (if they have any), and are also excellent lovers. They are tireless seekers of love; passionate, helpful, efficient, and cordial, they appreciate order and methods. They will always be happier dedicating themselves to anything related to education, well-being, and family, due to their tendency to take on responsibilities and always be willing to serve others or give advice. You have a magnetic personality and always attract attention: at parties, meetings, courses, etc. Professionally, you feel fulfilled in a senior position, where you can contribute to the development of the company, of things, and especially of the people involved. You are persevering and fight to the end to achieve your goals. The realization of your dreams becomes difficult due to your indecision and excessive demands, but you know how to manipulate the means to get what you want, and always, in one way or another, you end up achieving your goal. As you are highly sensitive, when contradicted, or when things do not go as you want, you can become jealous and nervous. You like to have fun, are attentive, reliable, and kind. You have a childlike joy and will always be cheerful. Naturally charming and sociable, you have many friends and admirers. In serious relationships, you are romantic, idealistic, and loyal, but you should avoid martyring yourself or being too possessive. Practical and economical, you tend to be idealistic and carefree. By trusting your intuition and learning to know yourself, you can have good relationships with people. You will be an excellent professional in the social sector (working with the elderly, children, physically or mentally disabled people), in esoteric and religious areas, as a teacher, decorator, cook, or working to beautify the planet.
b_day.7:
DAY OF INSPIRATION. Maximize: cultured, reliable, meticulous, idealistic, honest, psychic, scientific, rational, reflective. 
Minimize: deceitful, misleading, unfriendly, fake, skeptical, confused when dealing with details, inappropriate, indifferent, unsentimental, sensitive to criticism. Analytical and thoughtful, those born on this day are often critical and focused on their own interests. With a constant need for greater self-awareness, they enjoy gathering information and are interested in reading, writing, and spiritual matters. At times, they may feel misunderstood. In addition to the inherent integrity of the number seven, they also possess a high degree of independence of thought, initiative, and thoughtfulness. They have a tendency to be perfectionists and somewhat aloof from things and new friendships. Although they do not like to incur debt, they need to learn to manage their financial life. The desire to enjoy a good life suggests that they need something to motivate and inspire them, as there is a danger of falling into a routine and losing their way. They have a tendency to suffocate themselves with work and therefore may have nervous breakdowns and some depression. If you want to see you happy, talk about religion, philosophy (pure and simple), teaching, or any activity related to spirituality. You will always be more successful when you seek specialization in an independent scientific field, with complete freedom of initiative, preferably in something that leads to moral and ethical values. Perfectionist, individualistic, sharp-minded, and a good debater, capable of deep mental analysis. They should pay attention to their insecurity and indecision in their actions and the fact that they waste a lot of time weighing and evaluating pros and cons, running the risk of missing opportunities or not resolving the issue at hand. A dedicated partner, when they separate, it is difficult for them to adapt to a new relationship. Numerology advises them to marry late (after the age of 30), after dating extensively and fully understanding their partner's characteristics. They usually have no addictions (alcohol, cigarettes, and drugs); when they do, they are highly harmful to the liver, pancreas, and stomach. They should also avoid any type of gambling (they are unlikely to win the lottery or similar games).
b_day.8:
DAY OF MATERIAL SUCCESS. Maximize: leadership, meticulousness, hard work, authority, protection, healing power, good judgment of values. 
Minimize: impatience, wastefulness, intolerance, overwork, domination, easily discouraged, lack of planning. Those born on this day are usually organized, very dedicated to business, creative, and have enormous potential to earn money. They are fair, loyal, practical, generous (when they want to be), and have great executive ability and a strong sense of justice. They have keen perception and know how to evaluate people and situations. However, they need to learn to manage or delegate their authority in a fair and impartial manner. They usually appear austere, cold, and calculating; in reality, they are tremendously needy, sentimental, fair, and always ready to help those who need them. When things do not go as they wish, they can become direct (sometimes too much so), aggressive, moody, and with a great tendency to dominate everyone indiscriminately, whether they are relatives, friends, or employees. Given their great potential to earn money (or other material goods), they will be successful as a senior executive, working for themselves or in some activity where money is present and in large quantities. They belong to the business world and, therefore, must always develop their creative ability to carry out their projects. They have the capacity for great achievements through continuous effort, persistence, and determination. You can be successful in commerce and business in general, thanks to your skills and economic sense. You are progressive, creative, and have executive ability; you belong in the business world by your very nature. Your desire is for power and authority, considering money the best means to achieve this. On the other hand, in material terms, as you "love" money, you are distrustful, skeptical of almost everything, and to a certain extent pessimistic, which leads you to sudden bouts of loneliness, bad moods, and even a certain grumpiness. Despite this, you are rarely defeated, overcoming all obstacles that may appear before you. He does not let himself be discouraged by the obstacles in his life and rarely experiences defeat, because he does not blindly throw himself against them, but rather analyzes them and always manages to get around them. Be careful with addictions, especially alcohol, because it can damage the liver and make him more nervous than usual.
b_day.9:
HUMANISM DAY. Maximize: idealistic, humanitarian, creative, sensitive, generous, magnetic, charitable, detached, lucky, popular. 
Minimize: frustrated, fragmented, insecure, selfish, impractical, worried. Those born on this day feel the need to improve the human race through their benevolence, thoughtfulness, and emotional sensitivity. When they convey their emotional powers, they express their love and affection. Capable of quick and accurate decisions, deeply interested in everything and everyone, active in their thoughts and actions, they have a natural aptitude for everything that requires energy and effort. They convey confidence and security to others. They are very tolerant and kind. Most of the time, you are generous and liberal. Your intuition and psychic power indicate a universal receptivity that, if channeled positively, can inspire you to seek the spiritual path. You are a lover of truth, usually generous, independent, liberal, bold, courageous, combative, and unafraid of eventual defeat, because you know you will get what you want. You love to travel and meet new people and are usually not attached to anything or anyone, whether material possessions, friends, or traveling companions. At times, you come across as a very contradictory person, because as a humanist and a kind person, you should not be arrogant and rebellious, but you are, and in this way you destroy in minutes what took years to build. Because of their self-confidence, they usually procrastinate, and sometimes end up in financial difficulties; but in the end, they do well. They do not like to take orders and will be successful in matters related to religion, philanthropy, or charitable associations, where inspiration, kindness, and understanding are necessary. Love and affection are vitally important, and only these feelings can dominate you, as you are independent, decisive, and like to do things on your own, without waiting for others. No one, for any reason, can force you to do something you do not want to do. Remember that rewards will come through serving others and not through a self-centered life. Your body is very sensitive, and addictions terribly harm your nervous and respiratory systems.
b_day.10:
SELF-CONFIDENCE DAY. Maximize leadership, creativity, progressive character, vigor, optimism, strong convictions, competitiveness, independence. 
Minimize: arrogance, jealousy, selfishness, pride, antagonism, lack of control, hesitation, impatience. People born on this day are vigorous and original, defending what they believe in, even when others disagree. Their ability to start things with a pioneering spirit encourages them to travel to distant places and take risks on their own. They are driven by desire. They want independence of action, they want to progress, they want to put their initiatives into practice and see their ideas accepted, in order to achieve success in their ideals. They are quite bold, progressive, independent, helpful, friendly, physically attractive, captivating, and always ready to help those who ask for their assistance. To be successful professionally, he must develop his spirituality, otherwise he may be surrounded by the wrong people and will not achieve success. In addition, being a natural leader, he either works alone or in management positions, preferably in engineering, metallurgy, commerce, sales, or directly with the public, as he is very persuasive. As you can alternate between being loving, spontaneous, and affectionate or cold and distant, it is vital to have space for yourself in order to balance your sensitivity. Your naturally friendly personality guarantees many friendships, and your hospitality suggests that you are a good host. It is good to cultivate understanding, love for others, and learn to live in society as an ordinary and modest person, overcoming any feelings of superiority and your tendency toward isolation. You should avoid all types of addictions, especially smoking, as your respiratory tract is fragile and will suffer terribly from this addiction.
b_day.11: DAY OF HARMONY. Maximize: balance, concentration, intuitiveness, enthusiasm, inspiration, spirituality, idealism, intuition, healing ability, humanitarianism, psychic abilities. Minimize: superiority complex, dishonesty, lack of goals, excessive emotionality, selfishness, lack of clarity, domineering, petty, hypersensitive. Those born on the 11th have the master number within them, and its possessors are almost always affectionate, sentimental, and have a tremendous need for a home to feel safe and protected, as they do not like to live alone. Although their motto is harmony, inspiration is always present in their lives: they are diplomats par excellence. They seem calm and self-centered, but in reality they are very tense and nervous. They feel the need to develop their aggressiveness, persistence, determination, and steadfastness of purpose. They like to always be busy and feel happy that way; they love freedom. Due to their efficiency and abilities, they can perform work more quickly than others. Instead of being firm and practical in your desires, you may eventually waver or procrastinate. Although you can refine and improve situations, you need to learn to differentiate between being authoritarian and critical and helping those around you. It seems like a contradiction, and it is, because being understanding by nature, you shouldn't care about other people's thoughts, but you do. As you love freedom, you need to always be busy to feel useful and happy. You are professionally efficient, despite being more of a dreamer than a doer. Seek professional technical guidance to be successful. And more than that: don't stifle your intuition, it is the key to the answers you seek. You must overcome the tendency to live in dreams, as an escape, because awareness of reality is essential to finding, within yourself, the right guidance to achieve harmony and happiness. You have a tendency toward arrogance, and any addiction is very harmful to your body.
b_day.12: DAY OF SELF-EXPRESSION. Maximize: creative, attractive, initiative, disciplined, assertive, confident. Minimize: reclusive, eccentric, uncooperative, overly sensitive, lack of self-esteem. Those born on this day are honest in their intentions, fair, loyal, frank, liberal, and active by nature. They have commercial qualities, diplomacy, leadership skills, and enjoy helping others. They are very respectful of faith and beliefs, both their own and those of others. They are natural communicators; through their creativity, expression, and reasoning, they are able to convince everyone. They rarely give up on their ideals. They know how to take advantage of opportunities to express themselves and improve their way of being in order to always progress. You enjoy your popularity; you have a penchant for politics and activities related to social interests. Your practicality and agility in getting things done leads you to take on more commitments than you can fulfill, and as a result, you are always busy, overwhelmed with work, and need to learn to pace yourself, as you will certainly need your energy in special cases. When you want to win people over or simply make new friends, you are capable of playing the victim, leaving those around you in a constant state of anxiety and insecurity. You need to be careful not to let impatience and nervousness get the better of you. This can lead to bouts of depression and dissatisfaction. To avoid this negative side of your personality, you should always keep yourself interested in something constructive, preferably related to intellectual activities. Any failures, disappointments, and frustrations can cause problems with your nervous system, high blood pressure, and, in some cases, kidney problems.
b_day.13:
EXPERTISE DAY. Maximize: ambitious, creative, loves freedom, expressive, and highly proactive. 
Minimize: impulsive, indecisive, authoritarian, unemotional, and rebellious. Those born on the 13th are meticulous, authoritarian, systematic, practical, economical, tireless workers who always fight for their goals, sparing no effort to achieve them. Bold and dynamic, they prefer to make things happen rather than wait. They are associated with hard work and can achieve a lot through determination and talent. As they are influenced by their environment, they need to be decisive and control the direction of their lives. As the name of the day suggests (Day of Expertise), they are tremendously skilled at renovations, transformations, and changes when these are in their interest. When an occupation arouses his interest, he performs it with extraordinary skill. His main quality is expertise; his most striking characteristic is the desire to change, reform, and transform. Even though he sometimes gets carried away by dreams, his desires are real, solid, concrete, and down-to-earth. He is cheerful and talented, and can do well in artistic or entertainment professions. You are fair, kind, and get very upset when you sense or see that someone has been wronged. You also rebel against unfair competition or when someone is deceived. You may seem cold, materialistic, and calculating because you have difficulty expressing your feelings, but in reality you are very loving, helpful, dedicated, and a good friend. They tend to repress their feelings, whether they be pain, disappointment, or even joy. Few people truly understand and know them. Their life is guided by business and dedication to their profession (preferably in large industries, civil construction, or public administration), because being upright, organized, honest, and efficient, they quickly achieve a prominent position in these fields. To be successful, you need harmony, but success does not come easily, even though you fight hard for it. Sometimes you may settle down for a while, but you are persistent and never give up, returning to your struggle with the same resourcefulness and willpower that characterizes you. Setbacks and disappointments, especially with relatives and friends, can cause you headaches, speech problems, and respiratory problems.
b_day.14:
DAY OF UNDERSTANDING. Maximize: hardworking, lucky, creative, pragmatic, imaginative, and skilled.  
Minimize: overly cautious or impulsive, unstable, inconsiderate, and stubborn. Those born on this day have strong intellectual potential, a pragmatic outlook, and strong determination. They have a great desire to establish a solid foundation and succeed through hard work, and can reach the top of their profession. They always live in the present, caring little about the future, and are usually leaders in any situation or group. Professionally, they are a born negotiator and do not like to stand still; they are always looking for something to do, to make money, caring little whether they will make a profit or a loss. One of their strongest points is working with a lot of capital movement, whether as a financial speculator, real estate agent, or negotiator. They will always be happier as long as there is news and movement; they are not content to wait for things to happen. Your desire for movement can bring instability and uncertainty. If you can control your impulsiveness and acquire prudence, you can become very successful financially and socially. You usually want a partner who is disciplined and hardworking. With your charm and naturally assertive behavior, you always attract people who believe in you. If you can control your impulses, cultivate prudence, patience, persistence, and settle on a particular thing or place, you will achieve great financial and social success. When you are contradicted or your ideals are frustrated, you may have respiratory problems, some allergies, and even develop imaginary illnesses.
b_day.15:
DAY OF PERSONAL MAGNETISM. Maximize: cheerfulness, generosity, responsibility, kindness, cooperation, appreciation, and creative ideas. 
Minimize: restlessness, self-centeredness, fear of change, loss of faith, worry, and indecision. As the day suggests, 'personal magnetism,' both men and women find you friendly, pleasant, affectionate, and interesting. You love life, people, and nature. You make others feel comfortable around you. You are warm and lively; you enjoy entertaining and don't mind spending money on parties and social activities. You don't have major financial problems (you rarely become poor), as you are smart, intelligent, persevering, and always find a way to make money. You are not stingy, but you are somewhat attached to money, preferring to spend it on your partner, your home, or something beneficial to yourself. They have great human warmth, love social gatherings, and love life and people. Professionally, they have the ability to attract opportunities and harmonious conditions, and can take on community positions, management of esoteric spaces, or others that require understanding and a firm hand to maintain order and discipline in groups. Even in old age, you will always look young. You are honest, trustworthy, kind, and good-natured. Your organic weaknesses are your throat, lungs, and liver; therefore, any addiction is harmful to you, especially alcohol and cigarettes.
b_day.16: DAY OF TRIUMPH. Maximize: responsibility, integrity, intuition, sociability, cooperation, and discernment. Minimize: worry, dissatisfaction, irritability, selfishness, skepticism, and lack of solidarity. Those born on this day can be the most miserable of beings or the richest of the rich. Depending on the life they lead, those born on the 16th can become powerful, wealthy individuals; beings of complete success and happiness. Otherwise, at the other extreme, they can ruin themselves, leading to disorder and pride. It is essential that those born on this day live as altruistically as possible, have positive thoughts and elevated feelings, and in this way, they will surely achieve success and be very happy. The number 16 also represents the balance between the material and the spiritual. Acting ethically will attract luck and prosperity to your life. Due to your sense of insight, you enjoy and are able to unravel mysterious things and also like to accumulate knowledge. You are a being of great sensitivity, intuition, and inspiration, even having psychic qualities without any study of the subject. You often become moody and annoyed when others do not meet your standards of expectation. One of your major flaws is that you like the people around you to live according to your standards, and when this does not happen, you become moody and even angry. You generally do not like people interfering in your life or your projects, even when they are not working out. Professionally, you have great analytical skills and could work in the fields of science, mathematics, or computer science. On the other hand, as you have the ability to communicate and deal with people, you may be attracted to a career in education, law, or activities that involve dealing with others. Be careful that life's frustrations do not lead to obesity or stomach problems.
b_day.17: DAY OF PERCEPTION. Maximize: thoughtfulness, expertise, planning ability, business sense, hardworking, scientific, and attracts money. Minimize: distant, stubborn, careless, moody, sensitive, critical, worried, and suspicious. Those born on the 17th are intelligent and witty leaders. They are almost always in a good mood and manage to be friendly even with their opponents. They have a sense of insight and leadership, which they express through extraordinary humorous talent; thus, they win the sympathy of even those who suffer their criticism. They are born to be successful in material terms through hard work, persistence, and determination. Whichever path they venture down, they will be a winner. They seek the company of ambitious, determined, and hard-working people. On an emotional level, the people who attract them most are those who demonstrate harmony and peace. They are generally aware of their abilities and strive continuously to strengthen them. They have executive ability for business in general, their own or others', due to their practical mindset and common sense. Professionally, you should work in a group with other people, and only in sporadic cases can you do well working alone. You can do very well in real estate, commerce in general, as an executive working with many subordinates, or in foreign trade, as you are professionally efficient, economical (not stingy), and a great negotiator. It is up to you to be successful and win in life, and all you need to do is face the world and life with optimism and courage, as you have the necessary gifts to rise to the top of the world. When you repress your emotions or give up on your plans, you may suffer health problems, which are reflected in headaches, liver problems, bile problems, blood circulation problems, and rheumatism.
b_day.18: MENTAL POWER DAY. Maximize: progressive, assertive, highly intuitive, courageous, resolute, efficient. Minimize: uncontrolled emotions, lack of order, selfishness, vanity, excessive ambition, and inability to complete work or projects. The 18th is the day of wizards, magicians, famous mediums, and powerful religious figures. The 18th is powerful, both for positive and negative things. Those born under this vibration can be aware of their power and obtain whatever they want, both in the positive and negative realms. If they act with dignity, work, and study for the good of humanity, they will surely achieve their goals and be happy. On the other hand, if they act fraudulently, they will surely ruin themselves. They are dynamic and active beings, often desiring power and needing constant challenges. They are natural winners! They are intelligent, have active and alert minds, and excel in almost all activities. Your greatest enemies are your own flaws: vanity and ambition. On the other hand, if you are not spiritually evolved, you tend to give in to pessimism, fearing the unknown and the future, and almost always in this state, you end up being easy prey for adversity, ending in complete ruin. Because they are great fighters when they want to be, they can overcome all obstacles without fear of anything or anyone. They have an affectionate character and are also devoted to others. They must remain alert to their tendency to give in to pessimism and fear of the unknown, to avoid the risk of becoming a plaything of luck, going from defeat to defeat until complete ruin. When things don't go as he would like, he becomes frustrated and tends to get discouraged, have heart problems, headaches, and a shaken nervous system. In view of this, any addiction, especially cigarettes and alcohol, is truly poisonous to his body.
b_day.19: CHARACTER DAY. Maximize: dynamism, creativity, leadership, optimism, strong convictions, competitiveness, independence, good luck. Minimize: egocentricity, worry, fear of rejection, materialism, impatience, and tendency toward depression when goals are not achieved. The 19th is a day of success, prosperity, and happiness. This highly positive vibration has a certain tendency toward arrogance, stubbornness, and vanity. 019 is 1 and 9, the two extremes: the leader and the crowd. People born on this day can be either charismatic leaders, friends, understanding guides, and advisors, or domineering despots. They can be as generous as they are ambitious, sometimes an uplifting altruist, sometimes a sickly egocentric. Ambition and humanitarianism are some of the main characteristics of this excellent day. Decisive and resourceful, they have a penetrating vision, but the dreamer side of their nature is compassionate, idealistic, and creative. You are a versatile being and always want the best for yourself and your family. You are independent, artistic, original, and gifted with initiative and creativity. You have great power of achievement, but you get irritated quite easily, having outbursts of violence that usually affect your health. Despite this negativity, you never hold a grudge against anyone and quickly forget any offense you may suffer. Friendly and popular, you have no difficulty making friends and charming people. Generally attractive, they have many admirers of the opposite sex. However, if they allow themselves to be carried away by instability, their romantic experiences can be like a roller coaster ride, with many losses and successes. Due to their "paternal" instinct, disappointments and frustrations can affect their heart, vision, and hearing.
b_day.20:
DAY OF SENSITIVITY. Maximize: good partnerships, kindness, tact, receptivity, intuition, consideration, harmony, pleasant presence, ambassador of goodwill. 
Minimize: distrust, shyness, excessive sensitivity, a certain selfishness, tendency to be easily hurt. Those born on the 20th are sensitive, intuitive, adaptable, understanding, and enjoy belonging to a group. They are homebodies, orderly, peaceful, always spreading love and peace to everyone they know, and know, like few others, how to create pleasant and harmonious atmospheres. Good diplomats, they always seek to maintain an environment around them that brings them harmony and security. Their domestic instinct is highly developed; they have a constant desire for peace and happiness, even if their concept of this is quite different from common sense. On the negative side, you pursue your goals without caring about the means to achieve them, and can even be cruel and inhumane to those who stand in your way, stepping over them without scruples or ethics. If you do not overcome this negative side of yourself, you may face fatal material or spiritual ruin. Professionally, you enjoy cooperative activities in which you can interact, share experiences, and learn from others. In addition, you are receptive and intuitive, enjoy communicating with others, and are an excellent mediator or negotiator. If you develop your teaching skills, you may choose a career in education, as a teacher, or in publishing as an editor or journalist. You will be successful if you work in small companies or have your own small business, as you tend to settle down or want constant innovation. Emotional relationships are very important in your life, so it is essential that you do not fall into situations of dependency. Disappointments, frustrations, and setbacks can cause serious damage to your nervous system.
b_day.21:
DAY OF IDEALISM. Maximize: inspiration, creativity, unions for love, and lasting relationships. 
Minimize: dependence, moodiness, nervousness, lack of vision, fear of change. The 21st presents an idealistic and liberal character and needs the company of other people. Born to manifest and express their feelings and ideas. They have difficulty carrying out what they start, almost always leaving the finishing touches to others and, in most cases, also leaving the merits. Always interested in so many things, they need to be careful not to spread themselves too thin and jeopardize their endeavors. Those born on the 21st are considered "lucky" because, in a way that is inexplicable (to other numbers), they get "everything" they want. Often musical and artistic, with a penchant for theater and public speaking, they can be excellent film or theater actors. They are witty and entertaining and have a brilliant personality. They have a very dramatic, distrustful, and withdrawn side to their emotional nature, causing some discomfort in relationships. The 21st guarantees success at the end of life, but those born on this day must always be sure, in difficult times, that everything will always end well. In the first phase of their life, they will place great importance on pleasures and loved ones, always eager for different emotions and experiences. They will feel that they have a good education that contains such impulses, but may feel worn out and disgusted with life and people. They have other qualities such as friendship, idealism, and the ability to entertain. After the age of 40, your determination and desire to achieve material success will grow stronger, and the hardships you experienced before that age will serve as an example and a guide that will lead you to the success you desire. You need to take care of yourself with regard to psychosomatic illnesses acquired from frustrations and disappointments.
b_day.22:
PRACTICALITY DAY. Maximize: heightened intuition, pragmatism, practicality, manual dexterity, organizational skills, realism, problem solving, and entrepreneurship. 
Minimize: get-rich-quick schemes, nervousness, authoritarianism, materialism, lack of vision, greed, self-promotion, and laziness. Those born on the 22nd are especially practical and adapt to any type of work. To achieve their goals, they are capable of heroic deeds. Being a double '2', in real life things tend to happen to them twice, both for good and for bad, so they must make a double effort to live constructively and in harmony with all humanity. They have an extremely futuristic and perfectionist vision and end up not having great material ambitions. To live properly, they must maintain a balance between emotions and practicality. You work for the future, and because of this and your constant desire to achieve perfection, you often miss immediate opportunities. You need to be careful that nervousness and emotional imbalance do not alienate people or create constant conflict with those closest to you. Professionally, 22 sees far ahead and should always seek professions or occupations of a more general nature rather than those of personal interest. As they were born for humanity, they have an enormous responsibility to their fellow human beings. In order for all their gifts to manifest, they should work as a senior executive, chancellor, politician, writer of universalist themes, artist, or lecturer. Generally, everything happens to them or comes in double, so it is important that they live constructively in harmony. Their power is far-reaching, so they must be universalist and not think only of their personal achievements. You must always be guided by practical reason, as your responsibility is immense. Given your high degree of sensitivity, you are prone to psychological and nervous disorders, as well as changes in the glandular system, especially when your ideals are repressed or frustrated. Be careful with addictions, especially cigarettes and alcohol, as they are truly poisonous to your body.
b_day.23:
DAY OF PERSUASION. Maximize: loyalty, responsibility, loves to travel, communicative, intuitive, creative, versatile, patient, persuasive, and reliable. 
Minimize: selfish, insecure, stubborn, inflexible, critical, reserved, and prejudiced. Those born on the 23rd are sensitive and emotional. They are idealistic, daring, and romantic. Even though they are patient, they never rest until they get what they want. They have a striking personality, rare intelligence, and learn everything with great ease. They are gifted with persuasive power and investigative skills; with patience and tenacity, they can clarify tangled situations. Quick-witted and lively, with admirable and very versatile talent, they can engage in several activities at the same time. It is the number of material success and money, and its bearer needs to learn to follow professional paths, preferably high-level ones, and not go into business, because, being intellectual, they belong to the sensitive world and are not suited to serving anyone. They are gifted with a professional attitude and a mind full of creative ideas. They enjoy travel, adventure, and meeting new people. Professionally, they can be an excellent diplomat, politician, doctor, psychiatrist, psychologist, holistic therapist, metaphysical writer, or even live in the artistic world, achieving fame and high social status with this profession. It is important to be proud of their achievements, so their goals should always be high. Repressing their emotions can cause nervous disorders, affecting their health.
b_day.24:
UNION DAY. Maximize: energy, idealism, practical skills, strong determination, honesty, frankness, justice, harmony, diplomacy, joy, generosity, love of home, active and energetic. 
Minimize: materialism, excessive thriftiness, cruelty, aversion to routine, unreliability, domineering, stubbornness, vindictiveness, and jealousy. Those born on the 24th, in addition to the attributes described above, are also great friends, lovers of truth, and tolerant of others' faults. Wherever they are and whoever they are with, they are almost always the center of attention, not because of their physical beauty or stature, but because of their intelligence, warmth, and understanding of everything and everyone. Pleasure is important in their life; they cannot stand loneliness or seclusion; they feel a need for love, beauty, and harmony, and deeply resent discord and misunderstandings. Extremely skilled, you can successfully devote yourself to routine tasks, however diverse and complicated, whether they be domestic repairs, mechanics, or carpentry. As you have a striking and captivating presence, it is always preferable to go somewhere in person rather than call or write. Professionally, you could be a great doctor or psychologist, as you are very sensitive and understanding. With this pragmatic approach to life, you develop good business sense and the ability to overcome obstacles and be successful. Even though winning is very important to you, avoid being self-centered or dictatorial. Emotional crises can affect not only your health but also your projects. To win, you need to know that someone believes in you, trusts you, and fully supports you.
b_day.25: DAY OF PROGRESS. Maximize: highly intuitive, perfectionist, perceptive, creative mind, thoughtful, talent for dealing with people, and ability to make money. Minimize: impulsive, impatient, overly emotional, jealous, reserved, unstable, critical, and, in a way, moody. Those born on the 25th are perfectionists, demanding, diplomatic, and highly intuitive. In addition, they are quick and energetic, despite being intuitive and thoughtful. Sometimes, the desire for perfection can hinder the success of their activities. They are highly inspired and can be successful working on their own or in independent positions with complete freedom of initiative. Unlike those born on the 7th and 16th, those born on the 25th (all are 7; 1+6=7 and 2+5=7) are versatile and diplomatic. They have remarkable insight, rare intuition, and a developed analytical sense. They need silence and meditation to connect with their Higher Self and receive inspiration. Those born on the 25th are constantly in search of morality. They are thinkers and scholars and, as such, can excel and succeed in a wide variety of fields, such as science, the occult, philosophy, or work related to Nature in its broadest sense. Be careful with disappointments or frustrations, which you often face with great courage, but can cause stomach problems, such as ulcers.
b_day.26: DAY OF JUSTICE. Maximize: practical, attentive, proud of family, enthusiastic, courageous, fair, and persevering. Minimize: stubborn, rebellious, lack of enthusiasm, lack of persistence. Those born on the 26th have justice in its purest form, with perseverance and moderation as their main characteristics. They have great discernment, competence, and organization, and never give up on their goals and ideals. Those born on this day are usually solitary beings, somewhat misunderstood, appearing cold and calculating; in reality, they are extraordinary human souls, always ready to help the weak, their friends, and those in need of humanitarian aid. They have a pragmatic approach to life, executive skills, and good business sense. They were born to lead. They are very organized, fair, intellectual, highly cultured, and have a strong sense of responsibility. They are also elegant in their dress and despise modernism, preferring the conventional. Gifted with great executive ability and capable of managing their own or others' businesses well, they seek ways to strengthen their opportunities. You tend toward materialism and selfishness, always strive toward defined goals, and if you realize that your efforts are wasted, you have an admirable power of recovery. They are not disturbed or discouraged by obstacles, no matter how great they may be, but they do not blindly throw themselves against them either; they know how to study them and find ways to get around them. They are born to deal with finances and possess a magnetism that attracts money, people, and whatever else they need, even in old age. The vibrations of the 26th make you very skilled at leading, administering, organizing, and managing companies and commercial, artistic, and intellectual businesses, as well as matters related to justice. Be careful that frustrations and disappointments do not cause you biliary problems, headaches, rheumatism, and blood circulation problems.
b_day.27: DAY OF AUDACITY. Maximize: versatile, imaginative, creative, resolute, courageous, understanding, inventive, spiritual, bold, and mentally strong. Minimize: quarrelsome, restless, nervous, suspicious. Those born on this day are idealistic and sensitive, intuitive and analytical, with a fertile and creative mind, who can impress others with their original thoughts. They have a bold, liberal, courageous, combative, and independent personality. At times, they may seem deceitful, rational, or distant, but in reality, they may be hiding internal tensions. They think big and do not allow themselves to be dominated by prejudice and pettiness; they feel the need to be free in their thoughts and actions. Liberal, courageous, independent, and freedom-loving, they are bold and hate to justify their behavior. When they develop their communication skills, they can overcome resistance and express their deepest feelings. You feel at peace when you create a harmonious atmosphere around you. Almost always successful in material terms, you have a high sense of brotherhood and a universal mind. And because you are so peaceful, you never look for trouble, which does not mean that you are a coward; quite the contrary, because you can become violent when struck by injustice and ingratitude. Calmly determined, versatile, and powerful, they rarely worry about lack of money, because they usually find it easy to earn. Their mind is universalist and they have a high sense of brotherhood. If they do not have a superior and altruistic existence, frustrations, failures, and disappointments can cause them heart problems and some kind of brain disorder.
b_day.28:
DAY OF DESIRE. Maximize: compassion, progress, artistic temperament, ambition, work, stable home life, and volunteerism. 
Minimize: dreaminess, lack of compassion, authoritarianism, aggressiveness, lack of confidence, pride, complaining, and being overly dependent. The 28th is the day of desire, and people born on this day have admirable diplomatic skills and a spirit of justice. Their understanding is strong and they can be very successful in a leadership position. Affectionate and with high ideals, they are independent, have a lot of willpower, and are willing to make great sacrifices to achieve their goals. They love freedom and suffer from limitations that hinder and disrupt them. They can be a little contradictory and should avoid complaining. They need to develop their diplomatic sense and spirit of justice and understanding. Professionally, they have great vitality and physical energy and can devote themselves to several activities at the same time without getting tired. Always ready for action and new ventures, they courageously accept life's challenges. With your enthusiasm, you can easily inspire others to, if not join you, at least support you in your adventures. Like 29, you have many beginnings and few endings, so you need to focus on opportunities to become famous and wealthy. To overcome all Minimize, you must develop optimism, self-confidence, and perseverance of purpose. Studying and understanding human nature, combating selfishness and self-pity are your weapons to fight for success. Disappointments, disillusionment, and frustrations can cause disturbances in the circulatory system, brain, and heart.
b_day.29: DAY OF SPIRITUALITY. Maximize: inspiration, balance, inner peace, generosity, success, creativity, intuition, mysticism, leadership skills. Minimize: nervousness, bad mood, extremism, inconsiderateness, arrogance, and pride. Those born on the 29th have a sensitive intellect and, when combined with their powerful memory and leadership skills, ensure that they can make a valuable contribution in many areas. They have great listening skills and a varied sense of humor, and can go from contagious joy to the most negative of forms, violence, in a matter of seconds. They are highly spiritual beings. Professionally, they are attracted to occupations and activities related to dealing with people and can excel in careers such as teaching, coaching, advertising, public relations, writing, law, or any holistic field, especially in the area of self-help. Often, they can be very extreme and, therefore, should seek defined interests and maintain a calm and balanced mood, as their normal agitation makes them scattered. They need to learn to control their emotions and avoid passionate and destructive attitudes, as a broken union can cause immense suffering and difficulty in adjusting to another. There is a strong tendency to turn to religion or esotericism after the age of 45, and you must be careful not to fall into fanaticism. Being very observant, you need to learn to be less critical and more considerate of those around you. In terms of health, you have a tendency toward obesity and stomach and liver problems. Therefore, when you become frustrated or things do not go as you wish, or you are betrayed and deceived, you suffer greatly, especially in the aforementioned organs.
b_day.30:
DAY OF ACHIEVEMENT. Maximize: love of fun, loyalty, friendship, talent with words, creativity, and generosity. 
Minimize: laziness, obstinacy, impatience, insecurity, indifference, wasting energy, and not liking to be criticized. People born on the 30th are kind and warm, enjoy social activities, and can be very charismatic and loyal. Their greatest enemies are: fear of criticism and their sensitivity to self-censorship. Tendency to nullify themselves and to self-deprecation. Looking at the formation of the number, the 0 (zero) to the right of the 3 (three) clearly shows that there is a tendency toward self-nullification, self-deprecation, and underestimating oneself too much. They need to constantly be aware of their great value and their ability to overcome difficulties. Intuitive and original, you will be successful working as a self-employed professional and exercising your own initiative. You know how to take advantage of every opportunity to express yourself and improve. When you are truly determined to achieve something, no one can stop you. You are very ambitious and strive for high positions; when you make a resolution, you work tirelessly. Your willpower and determination drive your success. The power of love is your greatest virtue, and with your romantic nature, passionate temperament, and generosity, people are drawn to your charisma and charm. When your ideals are thwarted or your goals are frustrated, your nervous system suffers greatly.
b_day.31: SKILL DAY. Maximize: leadership, creativity, progress, vigor, optimism, strong convictions, competitiveness, independence, and skill. 149 Minimize: arrogance, jealousy, selfishness, pride, weakness of character, hesitation, and impatience. As the number indicates, natives of this number have great skill, ability, authority, and enjoy economic security. Gifted with great skill and ability, they find in order, authority, and economic security the tools for the perfect performance of what they set out to do. They work best in cooperation with others. They have original ideas and the ability to be successful in business if they have a plan of action and put it into practice at their own pace. Professionally, they can work in community services, but only if the participants do not hinder their steps or initiative. They adapt easily to regular and continuous work and are capable of great effort to carry out their projects. You have an independent character, persistence in your goals, and the ability to perform difficult tasks that others would not undertake. Your striking characteristics are: hard work, honesty, loyalty, determination, and thriftiness. You never forget a favor or an offense. You set very high standards for your life and are deeply disappointed in yourself if you fail to meet your own expectations. Note that each day of birth vibrates with the essence of the numbers you studied earlier. Example: birthday 31 has strong vibrations of the number 4. You will also observe this characteristic through the psychic number, which is the number of choices related to relationships, food, friendships, and others. This number is obtained by the theosophical reduction of your birthday.

psychic_number.1: The number 1 relates to the symbolism of the Sun, which is the beginning and through which all the other nine numbers were created. It also represents everything that is creative, individual, and positive. People born on the 1st, 10th, 19th, or 28th, which result in the number 1, are creative, inventive, and individualistic. They are sober, solid, meticulous, and have strong personalities. They are authoritative, lucky, ambitious, and seek leadership in all the businesses they undertake. They are creative, inventive, and have positive and optimistic attitudes. They are hardworking, generous, efficient in their profession, and honest. Group of people born on the 1st, 10th, 19th, and 28th of any month.
psychic_number.2: The number 2 relates its symbolism to that of the Moon and has the feminine attributes of the Sun. People number 1 and number 2, although decidedly opposite in character, combine very well when brought together. People number 2 are, by nature, kind, imaginative, artistic, and romantic. Like number 1 people, they are also inventive, but they are not as energetic when it comes to putting their ideas into practice. Their qualities are more mental than physical, and they are rarely as physically strong as those born under number 1. They are peaceful, kind, diplomatic, and intuitive. Group of people born on the 2nd, 11th, 20th, or 29th of any month.
psychic_number.3: The number 3 is symbolically related to the planet Jupiter. People who are number 3 are popular, self-confident, ambitious, and want to succeed in life. They enjoy success, are artistic, creative, and stand out as influencers and communicators. Number 3 people are ambitious and are never satisfied if they are in subordinate positions, as their goal is to stand out in the world, having control and authority over others. They are excellent at carrying out commands, love order and discipline in all things; they readily obey the orders of others, but also insist on having their orders obeyed. They always seek more practical solutions to make life more joyful and colorful and can sometimes be extravagant and exaggerated in their communication. They sympathize greatly with people 6 and 9. Group of people born on the 3rd, 12th, 21st, or 30th of any month.
psychic_number.4: They are stubborn, obstinate, and have a tendency to rebel against rules and regulations. They have a penchant for social issues and seek reforms of all kinds. They are positive and unconventional in their lives and opinions. Courageous and patient, they tend to support the unjustly treated and oppressed, thus attracting many enemies. They are honest, reliable, good friends, and reserved. They can be leaders of actions that cause great transformations. Due to their rebellious nature, they instinctively revolt against rules and regulations that hinder their actions. They have good taste in the arts, love to visit exhibitions, attend the theater and concerts, and love to critically evaluate these events. They can be excellent art critics, but their ideas are not particularly clear. They have few friends, but they are almost always lifelong. Because of their reserved temperament, they do not express their emotions and feelings, and this can cause them heart problems. They should develop ways to freely express their feelings and manifest them sincerely. Their main flaws are: being highly nervous and sensitive people, easily hurt in their feelings, prone to feeling lonely and isolated, and similarly becoming depressed and melancholic unless they have achieved success. Group of people born on the 4th, 13th, 22nd, and 31st of any month.
psychic_number.5: They are quick thinkers and decision makers, and impulsive in their actions. They detest any kind of routine work and seem naturally attracted to methods of making money quickly. They have a keen sense for making money through their inventions and new ideas. They are born speculators, prone to stock market transactions, and are generally willing and ready to take risks in everything they undertake. They have the gift of flexibility of character, are versatile, and changeable. They are thinkers, scholars, and have very active minds. Intuition is one of their gifts, as are adaptability and flexibility. They love to travel and acquire new experiences. Their weakness is that when they are under stress or pressure, they can easily become irritated. Group of people born on the 5th, 14th, and 23rd of any month.
psychic_number.6: They are magnetic people who are much loved and adored by those around them. Determined in carrying out their plans, they can sometimes be judged as stubborn and inflexible. Although number 6 people are considered to be influenced by the planet Venus, they represent more of a mother's love than sensual love. They love beautiful things, enjoy very artistic homes, and are drawn to bright colors, as well as paintings, music, and the arts. They like to keep their homes beautiful and tidy. They enjoy pleasing their family members and partners and do not like to get involved in arguments. When someone starts a fight or argument, they look for ways to resolve it (the famous "let's drop it and talk about it" crowd). They think carefully before acting and do not like to be contradicted. They generally forget offenses easily and tend to always trust their friends and family. Group of people born on the 6th, 15th, or 24th of any month.
psychic_number.7: The number 7 is symbolically related to the planet Neptune. These people are considered revolutionary, sometimes destructive, restless, and temperamental. They often face failures that can be the key to their triumph, the effort that leads to perfection and success. They are highly spiritual, religious, and have very peculiar ideas about religion. Generally, they do not like to follow religions and end up creating their own religion. They tend to become extremely good writers, painters, or poets, but in everything they do, sooner or later, they show a peculiar philosophical perspective on life, which permeates all their work. Jobs where analysis and perfection are important, such as systems development, attract them. They are not people who like to be on stage, but rather behind the scenes; they are people who care little about the material things in life, but are usually prosperous due to their original ideas or way of doing business. Although they do not like to be on stage, they can be good speakers. They usually have a desire to travel and study a lot about other countries. Studying is a pleasure, and knowledge is power for a number 7. Group of people born on the 7th, 16th, or 25th of any month.
psychic_number.8: People 8 are generally misunderstood in their lives, and deep down they have a very strong feeling of loneliness. Their nature is very deep and intense, they have great strength of individuality; they usually play an important role in society. When they are very religious, they go to extremes and can even be fanatical. Sometimes they appear cold, but they are sensitive and hide their feelings. As they like to take risks and be entrepreneurial, they go from great successes to great failures. The most ambitious ones usually seek a career in politics and often reach high positions after making great sacrifices. This is the number of security, determination, and impossible causes. When challenged, number 8s make the impossible possible. As they demonstrate authority, power, strength, and physical vigor, they are not usually helped and do not like to be helped. They are materialistic and what they crave is financial stability. Group of people born on the 8th, 17th, or 26th of any month.
psychic_number.9: Number 9 people are fighters in everything they experience in life and usually have difficult times in their early years, but are ultimately successful because of their courage, determination, and willpower. They are people who do not rest until they achieve their goals, and as they are natural fighters, they blaze difficult trails to achieve their victories. They are combative and make their way to the top of any field with a sporting but competitive spirit. Because of their courage, they make excellent soldiers or leaders wherever they fight. Their biggest challenges are recklessness, impulsiveness in words and actions, and involvement in conflicts with family members. Number 9 people react quickly to situations and pick up on the first sign of trouble. Their internal defense mechanisms are strong and always ready to face opposition. They are free, sincere, fearless, impulsive, and tyrannical; extremists, they believe they will shock and surprise the world with their daring exploits, which can sometimes end in misfortune. They have organizational and administrative skills. If given full power and control, their resources, efforts, optimistic attitudes, and practical knowledge can be of great help to companies. Group of people born on the 9th, 18th, and 27th of any month. In addition to the number of choices, you can seek self-knowledge through your relationship and marital harmony numbers.

personal_year.1: If you are in personal year 1, you should start your projects, begin, create, innovate, plant new seeds in your field. Remember that the biggest risk you can take this year is to DO NOTHING. Year 1 asks you to take the initiative, with courage and determination. To be successful and achieve happiness, you need to be independent, creative, confident, selective, and follow your own intuition. Do: renovate, move house, change careers, start a new relationship, start projects, get moving.
personal_year.2: In personal year 2, you must be very patient, diplomatic, and cooperative in your relationships. The greatest risk is creating or getting involved in ARGUMENTS and, consequently, causing ISOLATION. To be successful and achieve happiness, you need to be tactful, diplomatic, and cooperative in your dealings with other people. Do: seek to start projects with partners, if you have any arguments with other people, make peace, balance your personal and professional life.
personal_year.3: In personal year 3, you will participate in many parties, social events, joys, trips, and make new friends. The biggest risk is EXCESS and DISPERSION OF ENERGY. Success and happiness result from giving free rein to your creativity and expressing yourself constructively through words, writing, teaching, acting, or singing. Do: accept invitations to parties and events, take courses (get out of your shell), it's a good time to expand your family, visit museums, watch plays—it's the year of the arts.
personal_year.4: You have already started projects, promoted diplomacy, and thrown many parties in year 3, and now it is time for WORK, organization, planning, self-discipline, and methods. The biggest risk is PROCRASTINATION and professional complacency. To do: organize your home, finances, business, personal and professional life. Cut out everything that is unnecessary and superficial.
personal_year.5: In personal year 5, you will go through changes. Change of home, work, personal cycles. It is also a year of travel and fun. The greatest risk in year 5 is IMPULSIVENESS and excessive sexual activity. Success and happiness result from your ability to be adaptable, to seek to develop your own personality, and to seize opportunities before they are lost. Do: travel to unfamiliar places, make changes, take courses to gain new experiences.
personal_year.6: In personal year 6, your attention and focus should be on your family and doing good for those close to you. If you are thinking of getting married, this is a good time. The biggest risk is CONTROLLING or SUFFOCATING those around you. 162 Success and happiness result from selfless dedication to family and community. Do: take care of the house, learn to cook, tend the garden, seek a romantic relationship, resolve conflicts with your family.
personal_year.7: In personal year 7, you tend to be more reserved, introspective, and isolated. It is a time to get to know yourself and observe what you have been doing in this 9-year cycle and as a whole. The biggest risk is becoming a very CLOSED and critical person. Success and happiness result from studying the ultimate meanings of life. Materialistic activities should be avoided. In personal year 7, you should not chase after money. You should simply let go and let it come to you. Do: take time to study, seek self-knowledge, meditate, and pursue your spirituality.
personal_year.8: In personal year 8, money comes in and begins to flow positively, but if you have a lot of debt and financial mismanagement, it is a good time to be very careful. You need to pay your debts and collect what you are owed. It is a good time to sell real estate and also to buy. The biggest risk is financial IMBALANCE. Success and happiness result from the courage to dare to do great things, to use common sense, to be concerned about money, to be organized, practical, and efficient. Do: Start businesses, pay and collect debts, cultivate relationships with influential people.
personal_year.9: In personal year 9, you have reached the end of the 9-year cycle, and many people say it is a year of scarcity. However, I emphasize and ask you: what have you planted in the previous 8 years that have passed? If you planted sadness, you will reap sadness; if you planted happiness, you will reap happiness. This is also the year to finalize and get rid of everything that is unnecessary, enough of toxic relationships, toxic people, enough of everything that is not good for you. That is how you should think. The biggest risk is ATTACHMENT. Success and happiness result from compassion, humanitarian activities, emotional detachment, and letting go of whatever begins to leave your life. To do: develop spirituality, practice altruism, take time to seek connection with the arts, a year to complete projects.

personal_month.1: This is the month to start projects and take on new responsibilities, a month that favors pioneers, influential people, inventors, and planners. However, it is also a month when people tend to dominate, consciously or unconsciously, everyone involved. It is not a good month to make new friends, and it is best to stick to your routine in this regard. For business and speculation, it is excellent.
personal_month.2: It is a month of diplomacy, passivity, and receptivity. Remain calm, acting with kindness and goodness. As it is a month of duality, be mindful of hesitations. Exercise caution when starting a new project, especially if you have doubts, lest it not succeed. It is also a month of doubts and important resolutions.
personal_month.3: It is the month of contacts, joy, and social life; it is the month of intelligent, creative, and witty people. It is a good time to make new friends, discuss, plan, and take action on your ideas. It is the month of the ambitious, the proud, and those who seek personal pleasure.
personal_month.4: This is the month of stability and realistic, balanced people. During this month, justice must be upheld at all costs, as people will be prone to depression and even outbursts of anger if things do not go their way. You must be organized, practical, rational, and balanced in every way in order to overcome adversity.
personal_month.5: It is a month that favors travel, change, exploration, and innovation. It will be a busy month and an excellent time to meet and maintain new friendships. New sensations and new projects should be attempted, as the harvest is certain. As 5 is the number of sensuality, it is an excellent time for new relationships and for maintaining existing ones.
personal_month.6: This is the month to focus on your emotional life and relationships. During this period, you should remain calm, serene, and balanced. Pay attention to your responsibilities at home as well. This is a month when you should stick to your routine, stay at home, or work without innovating. You should not get involved in arguments or discussions.
personal_month.7: This is the month of retreat, introspection, self-knowledge, and self-improvement through meditation, analysis, and thought. It favors alliances, agreements, and the development of intuition.
personal_month.8: This is the month to deal with financial matters. An excellent period to start or conclude business deals, especially those involving large sums of money. Warning! Your nerves will be on edge, so it is advisable to remain calm and avoid arguments at all costs.
personal_month.9: This month, matters of spirituality and intellectuality are intensified. Goals during this period should be channeled toward humanity as a whole. People are confident, independent, courageous, and determined. Good for the arts, philosophy, and spirituality.
personal_month.11: This month, you will be encouraged to achieve great things and have revelations that may be material, mental, or spiritual. It is a time to put your ideas in order and pay close attention to your intuition. Your ideas will be flowing during this period. You can also learn about your PERSONAL DAY.

personal_day.1: It is a day to cultivate individuality, independence, and the ability to work alone. You should complete your tasks and whatever you are doing, and only then start something new. As it is the number of individuality, you should act only on your own thoughts and not be swayed by the "advice" of others.
personal_day.2: It is a day for associations, personal harmony, and seeking to follow the advice of others. You should cultivate patience, tact, cooperation, and loyalty.
personal_day.3: On this day, you need to cultivate creativity, social contacts, and the expression of your ideals. You can and should be bold and express your ideas clearly, simply, and bluntly.
personal_day.4: It is a day for hard work, for achieving what you want, a day for organization and planning.
personal_day.5: It is a day of adaptability and responsibility. You may change your point of view and realize that the world does not revolve around you and that some changes must be made so that there is a perfect union between your desires and the desires of others.
personal_day.6: It's a day for you to breathe, enjoy family time, and connect with others. A day to stay calm, listen more than you speak, and thus express your point of view without any fuss or imposition.
personal_day.7: It is a day to be alone, to meditate, and to acquire wisdom. One needs to develop one's mental powers, study, and meditate.
personal_day.8: It's a day of efficiency, so you should develop your projects, especially those involving large sums of money. It's a good day to start businesses, make plans, and obtain the energy of justice and material power.
personal_day.9: It is a day to think about others and how you can contribute to them. It is also a day to put the interests of others before your own. It is an excellent day to think about humanity and others. It is a good day to make donations, study, speak in public, and give and receive advice. It is not a good day to start projects.
personal_day.11: It is a day of great energy and power, when your intuition is heightened or more attuned to receiving good answers. You should remain humble and inspire those around you with your example.
personal_day.22: It is a day to serve and practice well for humanity, listen to people, and practice justice. As it is a super powerful number, try to extract all the power from this day.

challenge.0: The zero challenge is the best of challenges, allowing you to choose whether to overcome a challenge or not. Your intuition should be your compass in deciding this challenge. See if you need to overcome the initiative of 1, cooperation of 2, communication of 3, organization of 4, changes of 5, love of 6, introspection of 7, power of 8, and fight to win.
challenge.1: Challenge 1 makes it difficult for you to start, decide, and do things. You need to overcome and control your lack of initiative and tendencies toward loneliness. You need to learn to be firm, positive, independent, and self-confident, without imposing your will on others or expecting everything to revolve around you. To overcome this, START.
