challenge.2: Challenge 2 makes you overly sensitive and dualistic. Therefore, you need to overcome your lack of self-confidence. You may become very sensitive and vulnerable, which can lead to hurt feelings that you find difficult to forgive. To overcome this, MAKE A DECISION.
challenge.3: Challenge 3 causes you to live excessively and thus waste energy. You need to overcome excessive or insufficient communication. You will need to learn to find a middle ground between being afraid of social contact and being too much of a party animal. You must learn to be sociable and express your ideas and feelings without wasting your energy or behaving frivolously. To overcome attention, COMMUNICATION.
challenge.4: Challenge 4 makes you live to work or not to work. The challenge to overcome is disorganization or excessive organization. To overcome it, ORGANIZE and WORK.
challenge.5: Challenge 5 is freedom. The challenges to overcome are: instability, excessive desire for freedom, and fear of trying new things. You need to control the negative vibes of sex, alcohol, and drugs. To overcome this, be VERSATILE.
challenge.6: Challenge 6 is family responsibility. The challenge to be overcome is not to be domineering and arrogant. Accept people as they are without expecting them to live up to your standards; respect their points of view without trying to impose your own rules. To overcome this, give LOVE.
challenge.7: Challenge 7 is controlling excessive pride and exaggerated modesty. The challenge to be overcome is arrogance, vanity, and lack of self-analysis, excess or lack of pride, and unsociability. To overcome this, have FAITH and seek education.
challenge.8: Challenge 8 is money and power. Therefore, the challenge to be overcome is to supplant excessive concern for money so as not to become a slave to money and learn to master it. To overcome this, control MONEY.

karmic_debt.13: This debt represents death in all its forms. It means that, in past lives, the person committed transgressions against Natural Laws, such as suicide, murder, carelessness with their own life, and negligence due to addictions and other issues that led to death. Now, out of fear of change, they may take refuge in inertia, total indifference, and constant discontent, tending to be lazy, negative, and inefficient, or afraid of death. Those who have this debt are afraid of change or transformation, unconsciously associating them with death. To overcome their fears, they must avoid repeating the same harmful acts of their past. This crucial Karmic Debt is eliminated by "working," working hard at any professional activity. During your existence, much will be demanded of you, and you will have to fight against life's adversities and discontent. You must manage assets (yours and others'), bad attitudes (yours and others'). In this way, in addition to 'paying the Debt,' you will have fewer financial problems throughout your life.
karmic_debt.14: It is the Debt that deals with material goods. Human beings with this Karmic Debt will experience countless tribulations throughout their existence or until they learn their lesson: constant changes of job, residence, loss of assets (movable or immovable) and failed businesses. They may now face financial and material trials; difficulties in achieving sexual fulfillment and, eventually, even suffer sexual abuse. They may have an excessive interest in the physical, with loss of energy, indecision, possible illnesses, delays, and emotional disturbances. In addition, there is the possibility of emotional involvements that may end badly; disappointments, losses, and disappointments in the material and financial realm may occur at some point. The main "lesson" to be learned in this life is detachment.
karmic_debt.16: This Karmic Debt is the manifestation of pride, authoritarianism, betrayal, and vanity. 0°10 In this existence, your pride and vanity may be affected by possible failures in your plans, accidents, disappointments, and adversities. You will attract false friends and may have some dreams obstructed. There is a possibility of separation in marriage, difficulty in finding a lasting romantic partner. Loss of social status, fortune, and power, loss of material goods. To eliminate this Karma, you must be understanding, fair, and supportive of your fellow human beings. You must walk in perfect righteousness and not stray from this path, under penalty of continuing to suffer from the same evils indefinitely.
karmic_debt.19: It is the number of 'balance'. As we know, the law of Cause and Effect is perfect, and those who transgress it will, with absolute certainty, pay dearly for that transgression. You may now go through difficult times in the course of your life, experience loss of energy and wasted moments, material losses, injustices, weakness of character, and intolerance. Attempts to dominate everything and everyone, abuse of power. This Karmic Debt is eliminated by leading a righteous and elevated life, altruistic, filled with love, affection, kindness, and focused on the well-being of all humanity. By acting in this way, that is, planting good and tending the garden, the harvest will be abundant with success and prosperity.

karmic_lesson.1: Karmic lesson 1 links your learning for evolution to initiative, pioneering spirit, creativity, trusting your intellectual and personal abilities, the decisions you need to make to evolve and overcome your limitations, overcoming lack of self-confidence and excessive individualism. Now, to overcome and surpass this karmic lesson, you need to take the lead, be independent, and be individualistic with balance and without exaggeration. If you hold leadership positions, don't just be the boss, be a leader, and avoid selfishness and lack of affection.
karmic_lesson.2: Karmic lesson 2 is about collaboration, sensitivity, and diplomacy. To overcome this lesson, you need to learn to live in groups, form partnerships, be patient, and learn to be tactful, empathetic, and considerate toward others. To master this lesson, you will need to overcome shyness, lack of self-confidence, extreme sensitivity, impatience, and you will need a lot of diplomacy.
karmic_lesson.3: Karmic lesson 3 is about communication and self-expression, meaning you need to learn to express yourself, speak, write, act, use your imagination and creativity, think positively, and live positively. The lesson to be learned in this existence is to eliminate shyness, whether in speaking, acting, writing, or even dealing with strangers. You must also cultivate imagination, act with confidence, creativity, patience, and always positively. To overcome this lesson, you need to master the power of words, be cheerful, develop confidence and learning, and say yes to opportunities to speak in public and express your point of view.
karmic_lesson.4: Lesson 4 is about organization, work, methods, and concentration. The lesson for winning is about work and tireless effort, organization, planning, and stability. To master this lesson, you need to work with love, discipline, order, persistence, and systematization, and have goals and methods to be efficient and effective.
karmic_lesson.5: Lesson 5 is about change, new things, freedom, and responsibility. The lesson for success is about innovation, change (accepting and promoting it), adapting to the environment, controlling sexual urges, and impulsiveness in general. To succeed in this lesson, you need to accept change, innovate, control your impulses, and face new things without fear.
karmic_lesson.6: Lesson 6 is about family, love, and family responsibilities. You need to be a good husband or wife, a good father or mother, live in harmony with your siblings, and serve others. To master this lesson, take care of others without suffocating them, don't expect too much from them, and above all, take care of your family.
karmic_lesson.7: The lesson is about faith, spirituality, and self-knowledge. You need to seek understanding and connection with faith and spirituality, seek knowledge, and introspection. To overcome this lesson, you need to learn to cultivate and listen to your intuition, live alone or not and without fear, seek introspection, self-knowledge, spirituality, faith, and faith in yourself. Cultivate your intellectuality and self-knowledge.
karmic_lesson.8: Lesson 8 is about finances, money, and justice. You now need to learn to control money and not let it control you, act justly, and pay close attention to your material life. To master this lesson, learn to value money, make investments, refuse illicit money, and do not accept money that comes from injustice. Pay attention to the paths you take in relation to finances, because in this lesson, you need to control money and live justly.
karmic_lesson.9: Lesson 9 is about altruistic feelings, so you must overcome your lack of humanity and love for your neighbor. You need to learn to live in society and contribute to society, be supportive, and have compassion. To master this lesson, be kind, loving, generous, understanding toward others, tolerant, and learn to forgive.

first_life_cycle.1: The number 1 (one) in the first Life Cycle indicates a difficult period. As a child, the person needs to learn to develop their individuality in order to reach the 2nd Cycle with the emotional conditions to stabilize professionally. Ideally, children in this Cycle should have more freedom than usual, and their instincts should not be suppressed under any circumstances. In the case of people over 18 who are still in the first Cycle and have been repressed, i.e., have not had a proper education, they should absorb these teachings and put them into practice immediately.
first_life_cycle.2: The number 2 (two) in the first Life Cycle symbolizes an extremely spoiled child, who may have been greatly influenced by their mother or grandparents. They may think about getting married as early as possible during adolescence. It can also bring insecurity and the need to establish their own identity.
first_life_cycle.3: The number 3 (three) indicates a happy, carefree childhood and adolescence with many friends. A time of socializing and parties. This is not a particularly favorable period for learning, which should occur from the second cycle onwards, but there will probably be many opportunities for the expression of ideas and emotions after the age of 18 (some at a younger age) through the arts in general, music, theater, and writing. It is not a good period for marriage due to the festive atmosphere.
first_life_cycle.4: The number 4 (four) indicates family restrictions and hard work at school. An upbringing that may be from strict parents and relatives who impose their authority, not allowing any dissent (a kind of military regime). There is a desire to seek security and a need for something concrete and stable.
first_life_cycle.5: The number 5 (five) in the first Life Cycle indicates many changes and a freedom that is sometimes excessive and needs to be managed. A young person without proper guidance may have problems and become involved with sex, alcohol, and drugs. Due to the timing of the changes, it is a terrible time for marriage, and when it does happen, it tends to be short-lived. On the professional side, too, the person has difficulty settling down, constantly changing jobs or activities, which will only end when they enter the second Cycle.
first_life_cycle.6: The number 6 (six) indicates a childhood and youth full of restrictions, many rules, duties, and responsibilities. Due to the vibration of these difficulties, you may want to marry early to get out of this situation, however, due to your inability and lack of experience in marriage, you tend to fail. It also creates difficulties in adjusting to society, due to a lack of understanding of your plans and goals.
first_life_cycle.7: The number 7 (seven) in the first Life Cycle indicates a very difficult period in which children and young people may feel withdrawn and misunderstood by their parents, teachers, and friends, leading to isolation, withdrawal, and even fear of facing life at this stage. Around the age of 20, as a result of this withdrawal, they may develop guilt complexes and a lack of self-confidence, restricting their personal and professional progress.
first_life_cycle.8: The number 8 (eight), in the first Life Cycle, indicates a period of achievement. It is extraordinary for learning about the material aspects of life. It is during this period that businessmen, merchants, politicians, lawyers, and all those who think more about materialism are created.
first_life_cycle.9: The number 9 (nine) is the most difficult of all the First Cycles. As a child, there are good educational opportunities, but also a lot of tension. As a teenager, you feel confused, scared, nervous, and have great difficulty concentrating. The 9 is very sensitive, spiritual (by nature), and usually misunderstood by everyone around them. Ideally, they should not marry early in this period of cycle completion, and if they do, they should be cautious and cultivate love. Professionally, they have major relationship problems and therefore remain inactive for long periods until they enter the Second Cycle, when they can then put all their potential into practice.

second_life_cycle.1: The number 1 (one) in the second Life Cycle shows a period of ambition, a great desire for achievement and success. During this period, you need to study, invest in knowledge, and take courses to gain independence and solidify your position so that you can enter the Third Cycle with professional, social, and financial stability.
second_life_cycle.2: The number 2 (two) in this period indicates sociability and receptivity. It is necessary to cultivate patience and tact, and develop diplomacy and empathy. It may indicate a diplomatic vibe and a career path toward diplomacy, law, mediation, medicine, teaching, or consulting.
second_life_cycle.3: The number 3 (three) shows us the phase of sociability and parties, in which creativity and originality can help you express your ideas and feelings through some form of art: painting, music, theater, writing, communication. It is a great time to develop your creativity and control your energy so you don't get excited about trivial things.
second_life_cycle.4: The number 4 (four) is synonymous with hard work, productivity, and building the foundation for your future. It is a period in which you need to learn to accept routine and work on something productive and solid, save money, and make safe investments.
second_life_cycle.5: The number 5 (five) indicates a period that favors travel, change, romance, freedom, new friendships, and new work. In this vibration, you may find opportunities far from home. You need to learn to adapt and seek new ways of seeing things. It is a period of great movement, major changes, and new horizons.
second_life_cycle.6: The number 6 (six) indicates a period of family adjustments and taking on responsibilities in domestic matters. It is the time to get married, have children, and solidify the family.
second_life_cycle.7: The number 7 (seven) indicates a period of introspection, study, and meditation. This is not a good time to get married due to individuality. In addition, you need to develop your inner resources and pay attention to yourself so that you are not misunderstood.
second_life_cycle.8: The number 8 (eight) vibrates with justice and materialism. During this period, you have the possibility of acquiring wealth, material power, achievements in the business world, and the probability of making a lot of money from work and also through speculation.
second_life_cycle.9: The number 9 (nine) in this Cycle brings the possibility of success in public life. It is a highly spiritual period, and the person needs to learn to cultivate tolerance, love for humanity, altruism, and emotional control.
second_life_cycle.11: The number 11 (eleven) shows us a period of ideals, revelations, greatness, and possibly fame and crossing boundaries. It is a time to develop the mind, to specialize in something, to study, teach, and also to inspire others through your own example. The last cycle represents the moment to reap everything you sowed in the first and second cycles. It is also a time for reflection.

third_life_cycle.1: The number 1 (one) indicates a lonely end of life. The person needs to remain active, independent, and rely on their own resources.
third_life_cycle.2: The number 2 (two) vibrates with diplomacy and friendships, a period of sincere love and close friends. You may have a tendency to want to collect things, such as stamps, coins, antiques, etc.
third_life_cycle.3: The number 3 (three), in the Third Life Cycle, indicates a period of expressing ideas through various forms of art, music, theater, literature, cinema, or digital influencers. Creativity will develop. There will be many friends and great social activity.
third_life_cycle.4: The number 4 (four) resonates with work and organization, and you will likely continue working after retirement, either out of necessity or by choice.
third_life_cycle.5: The number 5 (five) is the period of change, travel, new activities and variety, new friends, new work, moving house.
third_life_cycle.6: The number 6 (six) may be the most pleasant of all third life cycles, with harmony at home and family responsibilities.
third_life_cycle.7: The number 7 (seven) indicates a period of introspection and isolation. A quiet phase of study and self-knowledge.
third_life_cycle.8: The number 8 (eight) resonates with the wisdom that a person needs to act, with study and the possibility of prospering and succeeding in the business world.
third_life_cycle.9: The number 9 (nine) indicates a period of retreat for study and learning. The person needs to cultivate tolerance and love for humanity.
third_life_cycle.11: The number 11 (eleven) is the period of isolation, inspiration, reading, some foray into the art of writing, and possibly fame.
third_life_cycle.22: The number 22 (twenty-two), in the third cycle of life, may make a person tense and nervous. They should try to stay active during this period and devote themselves to a hobby.

decisive_moment.1: A time to cultivate individuality, independence, and the willpower to do, initiate, and act on one's own. A Decisive Moment 1 in the first Life Cycle indicates a restless child who is difficult to understand.
decisive_moment.2: A time to develop tact and understanding. If you are a good friend, companion, and attentive to your peers, this will be a period of sincere friendships and lasting relationships. A good time to get married and make new friends. At this stage, the mother can be domineering and cause extreme sensitivity in the child's future.
decisive_moment.3: It is a time of expansion in social life, parties, friendships, self-expression, and fertility, with a vibrant artistic presence. For a child, due to this highly communicative phase, it can create difficulties in adapting to studies. It also indicates artistic opportunities that, if not nurtured and directed appropriately, may be wasted.
decisive_moment.4: This is the Decisive Moment of hard and tireless work, which brings the opportunity to build a solid foundation for your future. Pay attention to your financial life and save money. A Decisive Moment 4 (four) in the first Life Cycle often indicates that the person may start working at a very young age and take on great responsibilities while still young.
decisive_moment.5: The decisive moment 5 shows the excitement of travel, change, new opportunities, new sensations, new ventures, new things in general, freedom. For a child, it indicates boldness, restlessness, versatility, and sudden changes.
decisive_moment.6: It is a time for adjustments and family responsibilities, love, affection, success, and material security. If it is scattered or inconsistent, it can be a period of heartbreak, arguments, fights, serious domestic problems, and even signs of separation. It usually indicates early marriage or the responsibility of taking care of parents or a family member. When 6 is the last Decisive Moment, it can bring recognition for work already done. If the person is single, this Moment will bring the opportunity for new love and materialism.
decisive_moment.7: It is a phase of introspection, meditation, and study of the ultimate meaning of life. If you are not married, we advise against marriage at this stage, or the person you are in a relationship with will need to understand your situation and respect your space. You will feel the urge to withdraw into yourself, which in a way may cause relationship problems, both on a personal and family level. For a child, it indicates that they are withdrawn, lonely, thoughtful, and very studious. When parents are overly strict and severe, the child may suffer regression in their ideas and projects.
decisive_moment.8: It is a period of great achievements in the business world. And an excellent phase to pursue goals, to gain power, fame, and material success. With dedication, study, and systematic work, with a defined goal and capable and interested collaborators, it is difficult for a person not to achieve everything they desire. For a child or teenager, it indicates the beginning and dedication to business to work, to support themselves, or to support a family member.
decisive_moment.9: A time to 'cultivate' love, solidarity, and altruism. There may be some kind of loss and even disappointment, especially among friends. Doing humanitarian work during this period can be a good investment, as the fruits of this labor are certain, and success and fame will be present. For a child or young person, it may indicate a lack of understanding from peers, friends, and even family members, who, because of this lack of understanding, demand a lot and give little in return, causing the young person to withdraw and become shy and introspective.
decisive_moment.11: The decisive moment 11 is highly spiritual and elevated. During this period, you may feel tense and very nervous. It is an excellent phase for studying spiritualism and expanding your horizons through intuition and faith. A moment of inspiration, enlightenment, and, almost always, national and even international fame and prestige. Do not do or say behind people's backs what you would not have the courage to say or do in front of them.
decisive_moment.22: The decisive moment 22 is the most powerful moment of all, in which you can feel highly creative and capable of accomplishing anything you can imagine. It is a phase of interest in world issues and great expansion of consciousness.

interval_relationship.1: Independence, ambition, self-interest; on the negative side, selfishness and possessiveness.
interval_relationship.2: Tact and diplomacy, a great love of music and the arts in general. Harmonious and cooperative. On the negative side, it indicates insecurity and shyness.
interval_relationship.3: Ability to express oneself, strong imagination, and sense of humor. On the negative side, irresponsibility, impatience, and materialistic attitude.
interval_relationship.4: Economical, honest, and hardworking. On the negative side, lack of concentration, impartial judgment, and excessive obstinacy.
interval_relationship.5: Changes, favorable trips; on the negative side, impulsiveness, nervousness, strong desire for sex.
interval_relationship.6: Ability to take on great responsibilities, confidence, natural educator. On the negative side, tendency toward controversy, fights, and emotional instability.
interval_relationship.7: Analytical skills, mental agility, perfectionism, balance, and culture; on the negative side, withdrawal and isolation.
interval_relationship.8: Business acumen, executive ability, leadership, initiative, tact, and a strong sense of material values. On the negative side, a tendency to act like they know everything.
interval_relationship.9: Universalist outlook, artistic and literary gifts. Loves to travel. On the negative side, narrow-mindedness, egocentricity, and detachment from reality.

negative_sequences.111: With initiative and determination: the person becomes limited, losing the courage to venture into something new. They may also remain inactive for a long period, unemployed, or even powerless to accomplish anything, remaining in this state for as long as the Arcana that dominates the period lasts. This sequence can also cause various types of heart disease.
negative_sequences.118: It symbolizes unknown positive potential, working to manifest itself;
negative_sequences.119: Hypocrisy, fanaticism, conflict based on false causes; misuse of religion;
negative_sequences.123: Honors through children or creative work;
negative_sequences.168: Prosperity, gains, awards, or successful business ventures;
negative_sequences.222: With self-confidence: this configuration causes shyness and indecision, which can lead its possessor to be subjugated by those closest to them, whether they are friends, partners, coworkers, or simply acquaintances. It causes the person to lose self-esteem, limiting them in terms of their projects and achievements. It can also cause illnesses that lead to chemical dependency.
negative_sequences.333: With communication: the person becomes misunderstood, there is a lack of dialogue about everything and with everyone, especially with coworkers and their partner. They have difficulty asserting themselves in their projects and convincing people. This sequence can also cause respiratory or joint diseases.
negative_sequences.444: At work: it makes any professional achievement difficult. They are usually poorly paid; career prospects are difficult; they have difficulty staying in a job or doing well in any activity. It can also cause rheumatic and arterial diseases.
negative_sequences.555: With financial and personal instability: it can cause unwanted changes in employment, social environment, country, and partner. Under this influence, the person experiences many "ups and downs," unable to settle professionally, always looking for better opportunities, but without finding them. It can also cause "escape" from the social environment in which they live and lead to superficial and destructive diseases, i.e., skin diseases.
negative_sequences.637: The end of an evolution going back to the beginning;
negative_sequences.665: Competition or attainment of high office;
negative_sequences.666: With emotions and feelings: causes disappointment with friends, partners, coworkers, relatives, and even spouses (boyfriends or girlfriends), who do not understand their intentions and feelings. In view of these disappointments, the person may develop some type of heart disease.
negative_sequences.667: Good marriage; good business partnership; stability.
negative_sequences.777: With fear and intolerance: it causes people to distance themselves from everything and everyone; it can lead to disorder, turning people into dependent, vain, arrogant beings and, consequently, victims of their own intolerance. It causes feelings of loneliness, discouragement, nervous disorders, dependency and, as a result, possibly some type of cancer.
negative_sequences.888: With emotional and financial problems: this sequence makes the person unsociable, distancing them from social activities. If they are not spiritually evolved, they can easily lose emotional control. Under this vibration, the person can oscillate between wealth and poverty and, as a consequence, can contract serious illnesses or even have some of their dependents with such symptoms.
negative_sequences.924: High society, environment of influential people;
negative_sequences.925: Be careful with friends or subordinates;
negative_sequences.927: Secrets, facts that don't show and only the person knows.
negative_sequences.999: With regard to finances: people experience serious financial problems, lose assets (movable and immovable property), businesses fail, and they undergo various types of trials caused by long periods of paralysis. All of this can affect the nervous system and the heart.

hidden_trends.1: Tendency toward individuality, authoritarianism, domineering spirit, arrogance, and selfishness.
hidden_trends.2: Tendency to form associations, excessive dependence on other people, especially family and friends, both financially and emotionally.
hidden_trends.3: A tendency toward self-expression, vanity, impatience, lack of modesty, dispersion of energy, living without concrete goals and seeking only entertainment and parties, without worrying much about tomorrow.
hidden_trends.4: Tendency toward overwork, perfectionism, stubbornness, intolerance, and obstinacy.
hidden_trends.5: Tendency toward desires for change, personal freedom, living at the expense of others, abuse of sex and certain drugs, changes without apparent reason, rashness, and impulsiveness.
hidden_trends.6: Tendency to achieve, family responsibility, excessive concern for family, especially children (if any), professional duties; stubbornness, perfectionism, and attachment to inflexible and obstinate models.
hidden_trends.7: A tendency toward wisdom, knowledge, pretense, intrigue, and misunderstanding.
hidden_trends.8: A tendency toward materialism, excessive concern with making money, acquiring material goods, and power.
hidden_trends.9: A tendency toward knowledge, universal love, and excessive concern for world problems for the benefit of oneself and one's family.

hidden_talent.1: It is the hidden talent of entrepreneurship, independence, innovation, leadership, individuality;
hidden_talent.2: And the hidden talent of diplomacy, sensitivity, balance, and delicacy;
hidden_talent.3: And the hidden talent of creativity, inspiration, imagination, popularity, communication;

destiny.1: Action, Direction, Leadership, Independence You are called to take the lead, to direct. You need to trust yourself, your instincts, and persevere, not giving up in the face of any obstacle. Your destiny is to follow through, not to get discouraged. Your originality gives you a creative power that sets you apart from others. Your authority is natural, but when excessive, it can turn you into a tyrant. You work best alone and have some difficulty accepting orders from others. In this life, with a Destiny 1, you need to develop your individuality and leadership. Be your own leader and develop your executive skills and entrepreneurial spirit.
destiny.2: Sensitivity, Cooperativeness, Diplomacy, Unity Seeks peace, harmony, companionship, affection. It is the destiny of associations, of people who like to be in a couple. They are great advisors, usually very supportive of leaders, but prefer to work behind the scenes. You need to be careful not to become dependent on others or subservient; you must always take care of your self-esteem and personal power. In this life, with a DESTINY 2, your purpose is to promote harmony, bring people together, develop patience and calmness, and learn from relationships.
destiny.3: Communication, Self-expression, Creativity From an early age, 3s express the need to express themselves, to be in contact with people, to create, to customize... Thanks to their inventive and creative side, those with destiny number 3 do very well in the arts, sports, and all areas where they can show their infinite solar brilliance. They need to use this optimism, this joyful way of experiencing life, to lift people's spirits with their cheerfulness and joviality. The power of their friendliness, that special way of winning people over (the famous "game of flexibility") guarantees those with destiny number 3 success in life. It will always be through their communication and social relationships that they will achieve their goals. Your greatest lesson is to put yourself in the spotlight and make the world more colorful and happier. Your destiny is to bring joy, optimism, and a little bit of the sun's energy wherever you go.
destiny.4: Work, Construction, Organization, Logic The number 4 corresponds to the square, a shape that represents matter, earth, and stability. The path may be arduous and severe, but it will be constructive, requiring strength of character, determination, and self-control. Loyalty is something natural; those with destiny number 4 cannot live without very clear principles and defined values.  The 4 needs rules, security, and solid foundations. Their success will come from honesty, loyalty, and perseverance. Understanding that everything in their life takes a little longer, that nothing is so fast, will make their journey easier. Beware of laziness or overwork, excessive criticism, rigidity in opinions, and domination.
destiny.5: Freedom, Change, Versatility If there is anyone who values their freedom, it is the person with destiny number 51. Quick, agile, active, impatient, they dislike routine and are very quick-thinking. Everything new attracts the 5. Their curiosity is a very strong point, leading them to want to know and try a little of everything, and their versatility allows them to do many things at the same time. A rigid routine can distress a 5, so let's look for professional and personal activities that include constant renewal. Traveling is true therapy for those with Destiny 5! What should be avoided? Excesses, addictions (drugs and sex), recklessness, and irresponsibility.
destiny.6: Responsibility, Unity, Love, Family Family is the center of attention for those with Destiny 6. They love a cozy, comfortable environment, a beautiful home, lots of harmony, and everyone together! Their home is their temple, and 6s love to decorate their home, welcome people, with good music and food. They love flowers, nature, and have artistic gifts. They came into this world to care for others and have shown this from an early age. They worry too much about other people's problems and want to help everyone. They are very responsible and reliable. They tend to be demanding. What they need to avoid: meddling, jealousy, excessive involvement in other people's lives, and domination.
destiny.7: Wisdom, Spirituality, Knowledge This destiny is strongly marked by study, reflection, introspection, analysis, always investigating the reason behind everything. The 7 came into this life to use their mind. They enjoy the mysteries of life, the intangible, the mystical; it is a psychic number. People with destiny 7 have a strong inclination to be philosophers, writers, scientists, psychologists, teachers. They need to share the knowledge they have acquired. They are very intuitive and extremely perfectionist. They do not admit to making mistakes... They need to be careful with this excess of perfectionism and their tendency to isolate themselves from people, seeking "their" world. It is prudent to stay away from alcohol and take good care of their emotions. They have a tendency toward depressive feelings. It is important to learn to love people and express their feelings and thoughts more.
destiny.8: Material Achievement, Power, Justice Constructive, enthusiastic people with a strong practical sense, aspiring to success and material achievement. Those with destiny number 8 came into this world to learn how to deal with money, authority, and power. It is the number of the executive, the boss, the manager, the determined, persevering worker. Justice is part of the life of an 8—you must always keep your feet on the ground and not harm others with your ambition. If you do, you will pay dearly, because the laws are also spiritual and not just material. You must always balance material life with spiritual evolution — this is the great purpose of your life and to have a healthy relationship with money, not being wasteful and much less greedy.
destiny.9: Compassion, Generosity, Giving It is the destiny of people who come to help others, listen, understand, and advise, to be useful. These people generally give of themselves, but they are highly demanding of others in return, creating high expectations, which, when not met, cause them enormous frustration. All they want is a better world, for people to evolve and have a better quality of life. Those with destiny 9 are very intuitive and have a strong sense that they have a mission to fulfill, which is why they get involved in grand humanitarian projects. When they love, they go to the extreme—it's all or nothing! They need to be more patient, tolerant, and always seek detachment and unconditional love for all living things. Give of yourself without expecting anything in return, just for the pleasure of serving, starting with giving to yourself!
destiny.11: Intuition, Revelations, Inspiration 11 is a master number and is the DESTINY of people who live ahead of our reality. 11 is a number closely connected to the spiritual world, endowing people with great intuition, often with visions and heightened sensitivity. It takes courage to live the destiny of 11, because due to the sheer ignorance of others, people with this destiny can often be misunderstood, as they behave differently, often with a lot of anxiety, fear, and loss of energy. But destiny has something very good in store for them: to be a great leader, but an inspiring leader, because this is the number of inspiration, of the insights that their enormous intuitive capacity allows them. The 11 is very mental, so you need to make an effort not to remain solely in idealism and to implement your wise ideas. Thanks to your brilliant intelligence and creativity, you can be a lecturer, speaker, preacher of peace, writer, opinion maker, in short, work for the common good. Beware of dishonesty, vanity, lack of goals, and lack of faith. Those who do not act like an 11 end up choosing to live as a "2," which is the reduction of 11, without living the mastery.
destiny.22: Practicality, Construction, Elevation 22 is a master number and gives people with this destiny an enormous capacity to build, organize grand events, think big, and make their large-scale plans a reality. People who think macro. Everything about them is elevated and maximized. They are very practical and teach by example. Their endeavors should benefit a considerable number of people. They have a passion for world issues, for everything that happens on the international scene, or perhaps even the universal scene. They need to be careful with laziness, presumption, corruption, and exaggeration.

motivation.1:
You desire leadership, autonomy, independence, and originality, seeking to create a life based on your individuality. You have difficulty being subordinate to someone else, as you do not accept interference in your actions well, and you also have difficulty dealing with criticism. You really like being in charge, and you tend to be a centralizer. Your main positive point is that you have courage and face challenges head-on. 
Guidance: Take care that this strong individuality does not lead to selfishness or authoritarianism. Always believe in yourself, but remember that you are not alone in the world.
motivation.2: You desire peace and harmony, and simply cannot stand conflict, arguments, or misunderstandings. Your strength lies in being a peacemaker. Sensitivity defines your essence, marked by strong emotions. You are kind, cooperative, companionable, and a people person, often a little shy and insecure, disliking being in the "front line" and preferring to stay behind the scenes. Because you are very sensitive, you have a keen sense of rhythm and a strong inclination toward music. Guidance: Trust yourself more and don't give up on your goals just to satisfy those around you. Preserve your sensitivity, but seek your personal power.
motivation.3:
You want to live the good life, in an atmosphere of dreams, contentment, and beauty. Thanks to your fertile imagination, you like to create and have a strong artistic streak. You express yourself very well, and this number facilitates social contacts. Youthfulness and optimism are also strengths. You lack a little concentration and focus. 
Guidance: Be careful not to talk too much, get involved in gossip, and waste your time and energy on things of no value.
motivation.4:
You like order and discipline and cannot stand disorganization. You are loyal, faithful, reliable, serious, practical, and routine-oriented. You do not show your feelings much, but you do so through your actions. You are routine-oriented and do not like change, but you need to learn to face it. You are down-to-earth and like to dream about what you think is feasible. You love your work! 
Guidance: Be more flexible, avoiding the strictness and rigidity that can have consequences for your health. Include leisure in your life; after all, only working makes life a little dull.
motivation.5:
Your inner cry is 0 for freedom. You love 0 new things, change, diversity, excitement. Your greatest pleasures: traveling, meeting new people and experiencing new situations, broadening your horizons! Intense, attractive, sensual, curious, this number confers a certain emotional instability. 
Guidance: be careful not to overdo things. Avoid drugs, be careful not to behave compulsively and not to "put your foot in it." Do something that can bring you balance, such as meditation, running, Pilates, or yoga. Be responsible, live today to the fullest, but think a little about tomorrow.
motivation.6:
Your greatest desire is to make people around you happy. You like to give advice, you are caring, affectionate, and very responsible. You appreciate everything related to art, balance, aesthetics, beauty, and comfort. Your home is your temple and your family is your priority. Because you want to solve everyone's problems, you sometimes tend toward manipulation and possessiveness. 
Guidance: Avoid being demanding, give your affection and attention without worrying about the return, and always create harmonious environments where you can express your love.
motivation.7:
If you want to gain knowledge, you need a calm environment, without agitation. Analytical, selective, introspective, refined, very critical, and distrustful. You tend to be alone, because that way you can live more "in your own world." You like to delve deeply into topics and do not appreciate superficiality. You cannot stand making mistakes; you tend toward perfectionism. 
Guidance: Live a calmer life, but don't isolate yourself from others. Remember that making mistakes is also part of learning, so take it more naturally.
motivation.8:
You strive for material and financial fulfillment. You are not content with being average; you demand high performance from yourself. You like to have responsibilities and tend to be a committed and creative organizer when leading a project, proving yourself to be an excellent executive, disciplined and focused on your goals. Having material possessions brings you security and stability, something you greatly need. 
Guidance: Use your executive skills to achieve your goals, but always with fairness and ethics, avoiding greed and pettiness.
motivation.9: You want to give and receive love, but in a more humanitarian way, a love without selfishness, based on generosity and kindness, aiming for a better world for all beings that are part of nature. Sensitive, altruistic, romantic, and charismatic. All or nothing, you have a very intense personality. Guidance: You need to be more tolerant, patient, and do good indiscriminately, because you are a giver, but never expect a reward for an action you have taken.
motivation.11:
You want to inspire people with your ideals, even if you are not always understood. Avant-garde, magnetic, enlightened, you attract all kinds of energies, which can cause some vibrational imbalance. Gifted with great intuition and often clairvoyance, this master number demands a lot of respect in relation to spirituality. 
Guidance: Be careful not to fall into arrogance, beware of emotional tension, use energy replacement and energy balance techniques to stay harmonized. Avoid fanaticism and never seek to make money in dubious ways, using your gifts.
motivation.22:
You want to see all your projects come to fruition, always with solid foundations. Your trademark is practicality and setting an example. You have ideals, which you quickly put into practice. You have a constructive spirit and are focused on a large group of people. You love big challenges and accomplish them with flying colors. 
Guidance: Be more tolerant of people who do not have your work capacity and avoid associating with corruption.

impression.1:
Conveys an image of courage, power, independence, pioneering spirit, and leadership. This person is expected to take control of any situation, come up with creative solutions, make decisions, and be an efficient manager. Their dress sense is original; they don't like to imitate anyone, preferring unique and bold styles. They have a haughty, imposing manner. 
Guidance: They need to be careful not to be arrogant, unyielding, and egocentric.
impression.2:
You appear calm, somewhat modest, and seek peace. You are a collaborative person, but you don't like to take the lead, preferring to stay in the background and work behind the scenes. They value companionship and harmony in relationships, which explains their ability to attract a partner. Sometimes they take a long time to decide between two alternatives, as they weigh both sides carefully. They have a discreet way of dressing and behaving, always seeking a more eclectic and balanced style, avoiding bright colors and flashy patterns. 
Guidance: You need to be careful not to be overly passive in order to please others, and also not to be subservient in order to accommodate conflicting situations.
impression.3: You convey joy, friendliness, good humor, and sociability. You are creative, charming, attractive, communicate easily, express yourself very well, and make friends easily. When you arrive somewhere, you radiate a glow, like a ray of sunshine entering the room. Likes to be in the spotlight. Dresses very creatively, using their artistic talent to create interesting styles using accessories and unusual uses for old pieces. Guidance: Must be careful not to talk too much, avoid gossip, and stay away from anything that is futile and superficial.
impression.4: You show practicality, determination, organization, and focus. Your disciplined, conservative, and rule-abiding manner gives the impression of someone who is very involved with work and commitments in general. You are a person who respects values, being generally quite traditional in your behavior and rational in your decisions. You may seem a little rude, not placing much value on social life and leisure. You dress in a very sober, classic way, valuing sturdy, durable, and comfortable clothing. Guidance: You need to watch yourself so you don't become lazy, petty, stubborn, and inflexible.
impression.5: You are a shrewd person, quick to act, versatile, quite restless, and intelligent. Freedom is your trademark, and change is also a constant in your life, as you always need to break the routine and experience new things. You have a curious, magnetic, and courageous nature. You have an avant-garde, modern, extravagant, and flashy style of dress, always breaking rules and daring. You like bold, alternative haircuts. Guidance: You need to avoid volatility, all kinds of exaggerations, addictions, and compulsions.
impression.6:
They give the impression of being caring, responsible, advisory, and affectionate. If female, they have a maternal air; if male, they have the air of a good father, conveying confidence and security. Those with a 6 are very family-oriented, even considering their closest friends as part of the family. They are people who cherish their homes, taking great care with decoration and details, as they have artistic gifts and appreciate a beautiful and cozy home. Art and beauty are part of their world! They dress very elegantly, as they value aesthetics, but do not compromise on comfort and harmony. 
Guidance: They need to be careful not to become overly involved in the lives of others, becoming possessive, manipulative, and jealous.
impression.7: You appear to be an introspective, analytical, selective, and demanding person. You have a reserved, mysterious, intellectual air about you, and you like to be alone and close to nature. Natural environments suit you very well, as they are in tune with your observant, thoughtful, and meditative personality. The way you dress depends a lot on how you feel emotionally, but it is not something that worries you or takes up your time. You dress in a very sober, simple, and basic way. You may develop an unhealthy fear if you lack faith or spiritual support. Guidance: You need to take care not to isolate yourself too much, with depression and panic attacks.
impression.8: Reveals someone powerful, with an executive style, showing power, personal strength, resilience, and the ability to lead and handle business. Dynamism and determination are also your personal trademarks. Your dress style is mostly ostentatious, favoring high-quality, designer clothing, even if you bought it on sale. You also appreciate jewelry and other high-value accessories. Guidance: You should avoid excessive materialism, injustice, and indiscipline. You need to balance your material life with your spiritual life.
impression.9: You come across as a generous, charismatic, tolerant, and friendly person. Your cordial and kind manner always opens doors in your personal contacts. You show compassion and selflessness, which makes many people appreciate you. You care about your fellow human beings, the animal world, and nature as a whole. You have a strong artistic streak and a youthful appearance. Your dress style may be a mixture of styles, but thanks to your artistic gifts, everything harmonizes very well. Buying clothes at bazaars, with ecological concerns, is also part of your world. Guidance: You need to take care of your anxiety and your sensitivity to the suffering around you.

expression.1:
I express my ability to LEAD! If that is your expression, your name brings all the tools you need to be creative and original. You have your own way of solving all problems and your tendency is always to initiate action. As you always like to be 'number one' in everything, you are quite competitive and need to develop leadership and independence, always accompanied by determination and confidence, avoiding being selfish, aggressive, and arbitrary. Guidance:
  To be first, it is not necessary to destroy others. Learning to listen to others also makes you a true leader—patience is the science of peace. Characteristics: Entrepreneurial, pioneering, leader, administrator, executive, creative, independent, confident.
expression.2: I express my ability to COOPERATE! I am a natural peacemaker, who uses tact and diplomacy to reconcile the most diverse and difficult issues. In times of instability, I tend to be a balancing force, as I am always willing to listen and observe both sides of the issue. Receptive and kind, I prefer to work behind the scenes, as I do not like to be in the spotlight. I integrate into any group I am part of, as I am always willing to collaborate and be useful. My main tools are friendliness, patience, and understanding. Guidance: I need one thing to be happier: to learn to say no when it's no. It's such a short word, but it frees us from long suffering. Always listen to your heart and don't let yourself be influenced by the will of others. Your life is yours alone. Characteristics: Receptive, kind, diplomatic, cooperative, mediating, sensitive, conciliatory.
expression.3:
I express my ability to COMMUNICATE! Your greatest strength lies in your expression, in your communication. It can be through writing, music, theater, dance, fashion, visual arts, classes, lectures; you need to create and let your talents flow. Your greatest assets are your optimism, your joie de vivre, and your good humor. You enjoy social life, value friendships, and need to be that person who brings good vibes everywhere you go. You have incredible power of attraction, thanks to your friendliness and generosity. 
Guidance: You need to avoid dispersing your energy and getting involved in gossip. Characteristics: Creative, sociable, good communicator, artist, magnetic, cheerful, generous, optimistic, lover of beauty.
expression.4: I express the ability to ORGANIZE! A tireless, determined, routine-oriented, honest, somewhat conservative worker, you always give us a feeling of confidence. You need stability to be happy and are also usually resistant to change, but you face obstacles with great perseverance. You are practical, logical, rational, and loyal. Likes rules. Does not appreciate anything that is futile or superficial. Guidance: Needs to avoid inflexibility, stubbornness, moralism, and not get too caught up in details. Characteristics: Organized, disciplined, hardworking, simple, logical, practical, honest.
expression.5: I express the ability to CHANGE! Restless, fast-paced, and eager for change, you cherish freedom and always have fresh perspectives on existing matters. You possess a sharp mind, quick reasoning, and are highly adaptable to new and unusual situations. You have a remarkable ability to persuade others, particularly through your words and magnetic personality. Very curious, loves to travel, discover new places and new possibilities. Guidance: Needs to be careful with impulsiveness, exaggeration, irresponsible acts, and instability in their actions. Characteristics: Magnetic, freedom-loving, sensual, agile, versatile, curious, skilled at negotiating, persuasive.
expression.6:
I express the ability to HARMONIZE! Responsibility, a sense of harmony, and balance are the three pillars of those who have this Expression. The foundation is always love and affection. Those who come with this number come to care for, nurture, and cultivate beauty and aesthetics. A person very attached to family, with a keen sense of parenthood, who cherishes their home, which is in fact their temple, where they always welcome guests as the good host they are. Sociable, they value friendships and care deeply about the people around them, even providing community services. Artistically gifted and appreciative of a predictable life, with rules and obligations, which they usually fulfill with great ease. 
Guidance: You need to be careful not to overprotect the people you live with, especially your family. It is also advisable not to try to dominate them, suffocate them with your care, or cover up for their actions. Characteristics: Caring, responsible, artistic, lover of beauty, traditional, sociable.
expression.7:
I express the ability to ANALYZE! Introverted, rational, profound, intelligent, studious, and very analytical, this is how those with expression 7 manifest themselves. Study and knowledge are their greatest tools, wisdom is their guiding light, and therefore they tend to be experts in the subjects that interest them. They do not tolerate mistakes; everything must be done perfectly. Very psychic and intuitive, they are usually consulted by people who trust their guidance. They have a great capacity for discernment, for distinguishing good from evil, for separating the wheat from the chaff. It is very possible that with this expression, they may feel lonely or isolated at times, but this will be the way they find to decipher the mysteries of life and find the teachings they seek. 
Guidance: You need to be careful not to isolate yourself too much, living like a hermit, and also to avoid emotional imbalances that can lead to depression or panic attacks. Characteristics: Introspective, studious, intellectual, intuitive, perfectionist.
expression.8:
I express the ability to MANAGE! Organization, planning, and administration form the triad for success in the business world as a dynamic executive, an authentic disciplinarian, a born entrepreneur. You like to be in power, do not accept inferior positions, and tirelessly seek material fulfillment. There are those who have this expression number and use all their potential and endurance for sports, becoming extraordinary athletes. 
Guidance: You really need to seek a balance between material and spiritual strength, always watching yourself so that you do not become greedy, unfair, or unethical. Characteristics: Entrepreneurial, determined, perceptive administrator, strong, persistent, effective, fair, ambitious, skilled in business.
expression.9:
I express the ability to GIVE! Generosity, giving, humanitarianism, and high ideals are your companion energies. The vibration of 9, the last of the elementary numbers, is very demanding, as it is the symbol of knowledge among all. This expression translates into unconditional love, tolerance, acceptance, charity, and sensitivity. Idealistic and emotional, you feel the needs and aspirations of the collective—it is the number of mental and spiritual fulfillment. Charismatic, you enchant everyone with your grand ideals. You like to be in large places with lots of people. A person of great sympathy and charm, passionate and impulsive, you have a marked need to serve your fellow man, and may be inclined toward the arts, religions, and the health field. 
Guidance: Needs to cultivate tolerance, lovingly accepting any adversities that may occur, aiming for their evolution and personal improvement. Characteristics: Giving, generous, philanthropic, idealistic, humanitarian, charismatic, universalist, compassionate.
expression.11:
I express the ability to INSPIRE! It is a master number, therefore establishing guidelines for those who possess this expression: inspiration, idealism, innovation, courage, and determination, with the goal of making people admire and follow their ideals for an inspired and inspiring life. The number 11 is the highest octave of the number 2. Very intuitive and visionary, you may not be well understood by others, but you must be very determined to believe in your inner voice and move forward, defending your ideas and projects. A brilliant and determined leader, thanks to your creative and inventive potential, you have the recognition you deserve and can achieve success and fame. 
Guidance: You need to avoid any kind of fanaticism and lack of objectivity. There is no point in building castles of words and thoughts; you need to leave the dream and come to the real world. Characteristics: Idealistic, inspiring, curious, sensitive, intuitive, visionary, investigative, inventive.
expression.22:
I express the ability to ACHIEVE! It is a master number with strong symbolism. The number 22 is the highest octave of the number 4. It represents inspiration and ambitious ideals. Those who possess this expression think big and are inspired, confident, practical, have an exceptional capacity for work, and a desire to accomplish something great that will make a difference in the lives of a large number of people. They feed off their intuition, believe in their ideals, but their practical sense brings their ideas to fruition, always aiming for the greater good, which is why they are considered Master Builders. 
Guidance: You need to pay attention to details and not let yourself be influenced by people with more limited vision. Avoid pettiness and inferiority complexes. Always stay away from drugs in general. Characteristics: Idealistic, builder, achiever, sensitive, expansive, powerful.

mission.1: THE POWER OF INDIVIDUALITY As the years go by, you will increasingly need to strengthen your individuality and independence. You will see your leadership grow, as well as your courage and initiative, towards new opportunities that will arise. Autonomy should be the keyword for this phase, marked by a lot of action, determination, and courage. The consolidation of your entrepreneurial spirit could signal a great phase for starting your own business or putting an old dream into practice, where you are the protagonist. Pay attention to whether you are overstepping boundaries, thinking only of yourself, or being too arbitrary in everyday matters.
mission.2: THE POWER OF COOPERATION As you reach maturity, you will feel a strong desire to work together, collaborate with people by sharing your experience, and arbitrate conflicts in search of harmony, because the true fulfillment of this mission is to bring people together, and vibration 2 brings a lot of tact, diplomacy in relationships, and enormous sensitivity to the needs of your peers. You will discover that your personal power manifests itself greatly through your ability to persuade, your kindness, and your compassion. You will need to overcome your shyness and trust in your strength.
mission.3: THE POWER OF COMMUNICATION Over the years, you will notice greater ease in communicating and a strong desire to express yourself, which may come through the arts. Some people feel the urge to paint, write, play an instrument, dance, act... in short, an artistic ability that will reveal itself and needs to be experienced. Your imagination and creativity will be heightened, and if you experience this phase well, you will have a more sociable, interactive, and happier life. Be careful not to fall into superficiality and waste necessary energy, such as time and money.
mission.4: THE POWER OF DISCIPLINE You will find yourself more organized, practical, and down-to-earth as you reach maturity. It will be a very active and fulfilling period, as you will have focus, goals to achieve, and your desire for stability and security, combined with your enormous sense of responsibility, will not give much chance to that life that many aspire to, of a peaceful retirement, just enjoying life. You will want to invest your days in more solid, profitable things, but also find a moment to relax, have fun, and enjoy nature, which is also part of good time management.
mission.5: THE POWER OF VERSATILITY As you reach maturity, you will seem even more dynamic and agile, and with your great curiosity and restlessness, you will have the energy to take up a hobby, activity, or second profession that you have always wanted and now have the opportunity to pursue. Travel opportunities will arise and should be taken advantage of for your intellectual and social enrichment. You will have the opportunity to expand your knowledge and contacts and experience the freedom you value so much. Your creativity, quick thinking, and public speaking skills will be at their peak. You will face some challenges: maintaining focus, discipline, and perseverance, seeking to complete all processes you start with the same initial interest.
mission.6: THE POWER OF AFFECTION As you mature, you will feel the need to devote more time to those you consider important, including family members, close friends, and even your community. Your concern for people's well-being may lead you to seek a profession that involves harmonization, balance, and counseling, or to do so on a voluntary basis, seeking only personal fulfillment. It is time to assert your ability to protect and your responsibility, but without interfering in the lives of others and without overburdening yourself with what does not belong to you. Lean on the arts for your personal balance and expression of your good taste.
mission.7: THE POWER OF KNOWLEDGE Over the years, you will feel the need for a greater understanding of life, including a deeper understanding of who you are, why you are here, and the meaning of your existence. Seven is the number of experts, so get ready to become a profound connoisseur of subjects that interest you and to which you devote your time. All this acquired knowledge will tend to be shared, so it is very common at this stage to think about writing books, teaching classes, and giving lectures. On the other hand, you will need periods of quiet, concentration, wrapped in your thoughts and immersions. Take care not to live in a parallel world, have faith, and respect your intuition.
mission.8: THE POWER OF REALIZATION Upon reaching maturity, you will feel a strong desire to look more at the material side of life, evaluating your achievements and also what you have not yet been able to make real, and thus you will aim to achieve the goals you have set for yourself up to that point. With the power of 8, you will have the ability to manage your possessions and even those of others, if you channel this mission into your professional life, thanks to your ability to plan, strategize, and control the situation, seeking concrete results. Life asks you to enjoy material things, but not to become obsessed with money and to maintain a balance—this is the best advice—between your material and spiritual life.
mission.9: THE POWER OF UNIVERSALITY A deep desire to do good collectively will take hold of you as you reach maturity. Concern for the well-being of everyone, both now and in the future, care for the planet and all species, you go beyond your individuality and start to live as a whole. As 9 is a number "without borders," you will feel like a citizen of the world and want to experience other cultures, visit other countries, or even live abroad for a while. Learning other languages, immersing yourself in the world of the arts, and discovering talents that were previously dormant. Doing good, getting involved in humanitarian work, feeling that you make a difference in someone's life—all of this will come naturally under the influence of the universalist number 9. But pay attention to one thing: always be generous to yourself too!
mission.11: THE POWER OF INSPIRATION As time goes by, you will notice a restlessness within yourself, a calling, something that is not yet identifiable, but which points to a true mission. Your intuition and sensitivity will increase considerably, and the most assertive path is faith and openness to a greater connection, taking advantage of your magnetism and your ability to communicate to inspire people to understand their roles in this journey and seek the expansion of consciousness. In this New Age, master numbers play a major role, and those who have them in their numerology chart will feel an enormous responsibility and, at times, even resistance, but by surrendering to the power of the number, many doors will open, and the emptiness that once manifested itself will be replaced by a feeling of fulfillment and peace.
mission.22: THE POWER OF CONSTRUCTION With the arrival of maturity, this master number, whose power points to great goals, will be responsible for a feeling that something great must be built at this stage of your life. This desire aims to achieve something that is beneficial to humanity, and 22 is the number of practicality, so it is important that such projects leave the realm of idealism and become reality, even if this requires a certain amount of time until the actual realization. When it comes to master numbers, great power is given to those who possess them, but this power can be used positively or negatively, like everything in life, according to each person's free will. These are very strong vibrations, which, until they are perfectly understood and absorbed, can cause some upheavals and twists and turns in the lives of these people. Master Numbers, when used well, leave a great legacy for humanity, hence the importance of knowing ourselves and being aware of the role and power that each number brings.
